title: Make.com Automation Specialist (One-Time Project / Possible Long-Term)
description:
LOOKING FOR: An experienced Make.com specialist to build a full content automation system for a Connecticut-based media company with two brands (social media content + luxury real estate photography/video).

THE SYSTEM HAS 4 PARTS:

 1. CONTENT GENERATOR

Google Drive folder trigger ? Claude API ? generates captions for 7 platforms ? outputs to a Google Sheet organized by brand and date

 2. AUTO POSTER

Reads approved content from Google Sheet ? sends to Buffer ? Buffer auto-posts to Instagram and TikTok on a set schedule

 3. VIDEO PIPELINE

New footage dropped in Google Drive ? triggers Opus Clip API (short-form reels) and Pictory AI (property walkthroughs) ? finished videos route to an approval folder ? once approved, Make sends to Buffer for posting

 4. INSTAGRAM DM SEQUENCES

Prospect replies to Instagram DM ? Make catches it via webhook ? sends to Claude API for response generation ? routes back through ManyChat for delivery ? automated follow-up sequence triggers if prospect goes quiet (Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, Day 30)

TOOLS INVOLVED:

— Make.com (core)

— Claude API (Anthropic)

— Google Drive + Google Sheets

— Buffer

— Opus Clip API

— Pictory AI

— ManyChat

— Gmail (automated client delivery
s)

WHAT I PROVIDE:

— Full system map with step-by-step flow for every scenario

— All API keys and account access once hired

— Clear brand context and prompt documentation for Claude

— Direct communication and fast response times

WHAT I NEED FROM YOU:

— Proven Make.com experience (please show examples or past automation builds)

— Familiarity with API integrations (Claude, Buffer, or similar)

— Clean build with documentation so the system can be maintained

— Completion within 7–10 days of project start

BUDGET: $300–500 fixed price (open to discussion based on experience)

This is a one-time build with potential for ongoing work as the system scales. If you know Make.com inside out and have built automation systems like this before — let’s talk.

title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO) - Australia Company
description:
Chief Financial Officer (CFO)



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Industry: Screen Printing / Manufacturing / E-commerce



-



About Us:



We are a growing Australian-based screen printing and merchandise company working with brands, artists, and businesses to produce high-quality custom products.



We operate lean and efficiently, combining local leadership with offshore talent. As we scale, we are looking for an experienced Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to take ownership of our financial operations and support strategic growth.



-



Role Overview



This is a hands-on CFO role suited to someone with strong experience in Australian businesses who can operate both strategically and operationally.



You will be responsible for overseeing the full finance function, improving financial processes, and providing clear insights to support business decisions - while also being comfortable getting involved in day-to-day accounting when required.



-



Key Responsibilities:



Financial Leadership & Strategy

• Lead the financial strategy of the business

• Provide insights on profitability, cost control, and growth opportunities

• Support decision-making with clear financial reporting and analysis

• Develop and monitor KPIs across the business



Reporting & Compliance (Australia-Focused)

Oversee preparation of:

• Monthly management reports

• P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow statements

• Ensure compliance with:

• BAS, GST, PAYG, Superannuation

• Liaise with external accountants and advisors in Australia



Cash Flow & Budgeting

• Own cash flow forecasting and management

• Develop and manage budgets and financial models

• Monitor financial performance vs forecasts



Operations & Team Management

• Manage and oversee offshore admin/accounting team

• Ensure accuracy of bookkeeping, reconciliations, and reporting

• Improve systems, processes, and workflows



Hands-On Financial Management

• Oversee (and when required assist with):

• AP/AR

• Payroll

• Bank reconciliations

• Ensure Xero is accurate and up to date



-



Requirements



Must Have

• Minimum 5+ years experience in a CFO / Financial Controller role within an Australian business

Strong understanding of:

• Australian accounting standards and tax requirements

• BAS, GST, PAYG, Superannuation

• Proven experience managing financial reporting, cash flow, and budgeting

• Advanced experience with:

• Xero (essential)

• Excel / Google Sheets

• Experience managing or working with offshore teams

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)



-



Highly Preferred

• Experience in SME / owner-operated businesses

• Experience in manufacturing, e-commerce, or inventory-based businesses

• CPA / CA qualified (or equivalent experience)

• Process improvement and automation experience



-



When applying please include:



1. A brief summary of your experience working with Australian companies

2. Your experience with Xero and BAS/GST reporting

3. Examples of businesses you have supported as a CFO or Financial Controller

a. optimal number of screenshots

? Must include App Store / Google Play screenshot designs

We are looking to review multiple candidates, so strong relevant portfolios will be prioritized.

title: Video Editor for Ads
description:
About the Role

We're scaling two consumer brands in the health supplement and pet wellness space, and we need a video editor who's built for speed and results. This isn't a "make it pretty" role. This is a performance marketing seat. Every edit you ship is a weapon in our ad account, and we measure everything.

If you understand why the first 3 seconds make or break an ad, you belong here.



What You'll Be Doing



Producing 10 finished ad creatives per day — fast turnaround is non-negotiable

Editing high-converting video ads for
 & Instagram (Meta ecosystem)

Building multiple hooks and angle variations for A/B testing

Following proven DR frameworks: Hook ? Problem ? Agitate ? Solution ? CTA

Adding captions, sound design, motion graphics, and pacing that stops the scroll

Repurposing footage into UGC-style, testimonial, product demo, and lifestyle formats

Reviewing performance data with media buyers and iterating quickly

Collaborating with our creative strategist and the founder to align every creative with campaign goals





You Must Have



? Proven DTC direct response video editing experience (portfolio required)

? A real track record with high-performing Meta ads — show us the work

? The speed to deliver 10 videos per day without sacrificing quality

? Deep understanding of hooks, retention, scroll-stopping pacing, and conversion psychology

? Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or equivalent tools

? Mobile-first editing instincts — you optimize for thumb, sound-off, and 9:16





Bonus Points If You



Have edited ads for eCommerce, health supplements, or pet wellness brands

Understand ad metrics like CTR, ROAS, CPA, thumb-stop rate, and hook rate

Know what makes a health or pet product feel trustworthy and compelling on screen

Put apple at the start of your cover letter





What We're Looking For

Someone who thinks like a marketer first, editor second. You're data-aware, creatively sharp, and can pump out winning variations without hand-holding. If you slow down under volume or need days to deliver — this isn't the role for you.

Fast. Strategic. Results-driven. That's the standard here. 



How to apply:

Step 1 — Share Your Work

Send us the link to your portfolio or a sample of Meta ads you've edited, preferably in the health, wellness, or pet niche.

Step 2 — Tell Us Why You're the One

In 3 to 5 sentences, tell us why we should hire you over everyone else applying for this role. Be direct and specific — no generic or ai answers.

Step 3 — Confirm Your Availability for a Trial

We require a one-video trial edit before officially bringing anyone on board. Let us know if you're open to this and how soon you can start.

title: Applied AI Systems Engineer
description:
We Don't Need an AI Researcher. We Need an Engineer Who Ships AI That Actually Works in Production.

Applied AI Systems Engineer

Most AI engineers build demos. You'll build production pipelines that generate real business value.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started.

???? Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values

???? GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

? ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

???? TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Mission

Turn AI into reliable, production-grade pipelines.

You'll take AI capabilities and make them actually work—consistently, at scale, with proper validation and quality control. No more "it works sometimes" demos.



What You'll Do

Build and maintain AI generation pipelines that run reliably in production

Design and implement agent chaining for complex multi-step workflows

Create validation and QC logic to ensure output quality

Integrate with evidence stores and data systems

Monitor and improve pipeline performance and reliability

Debug and fix issues when AI outputs go sideways



What We're Looking For

2+ years of experience building production AI/ML systems

Strong experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

Understanding of prompt engineering and output validation

Experience building multi-step AI pipelines or agent systems

Proficiency in Python

Familiarity with async programming and API integrations

Bonus Points:

Experience with LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar frameworks

Background in e-commerce or content generation

You've built systems that validate and QC AI outputs at scale

Experience with vector databases and RAG systems



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

Engineers who want to do ML research, not production systems

Those who think prompt engineering is beneath them

Anyone who hasn't shipped AI to production users

People who can't debug why an AI pipeline is producing garbage



Compensation & Benefits

???? Monthly Salary: $2,000/month

Plus:

Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

Remote-first environment

Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Task Test - Build a pipeline that generates multiple outputs from structured input and validates them using configurable rules

Step 3: Interview with Founder

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

???? Apply Here:

[  
  ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. We're hiring 2 engineers for this role. If you've built AI systems that run thousands of generations per day without constant babysitting, we should talk.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

4. Describe your experience using 
 in a professional or administrative capacity.

Vocaroo Instructions

• Your relevant experience with the systems and tools listed above

• Why your background aligns with this role







(Applications that do not include all required items may not be considered)

title: SEO EXPERT
description:
SEO Growth Lead (Not a Beginner Role)



We’re looking for a **serious SEO operator** to take full control of our organic growth.



This is not a “write a few blogs” role.

This is **build, scale, dominate rankings, and drive revenue.**



We already have:



* 50+ live blogs

* Multiple domains across different niches

* A foundation in place



Now we need someone who can **turn this into a traffic + lead machine.**



---



## ???? What You’ll Be Responsible For



### 1. Authority Building (Backlinks That Actually Move Rankings)



* Build **high-quality, white-hat backlinks**

* Secure real placements (guest posts, niche edits, partnerships)

* Reverse-engineer competitor backlink profiles

* Run outreach campaigns at scale 
, partnerships, placements)



???? No spam links. No Fiverr junk. Real domains only.



---



### 2. Keyword Expansion (Money Keywords Only)



* Identify **high-intent, revenue-driving keywords**

* Expand existing blogs with **long-tail + semantic keywords**

* Build **topic clusters** across our sites

* Find **low competition, high ROI opportunities**



---



### 3. Blog & On-Page Optimization



* Optimize all existing blogs for:



  * Internal linking

  * Proper structure (H1–H3, readability)

  * Keyword placement & density

* Improve **CTR (titles, meta descriptions)**

* Turn content into **conversion-focused pages**



---



### 4. Technical SEO & Performance



* Ensure all pages are:



  * Properly indexed

  * Fast-loading

  * Structured correctly (schema, crawlability)

* Fix any issues affecting rankings



---



## ???? What We Care About (KPIs)



* Organic traffic growth

* Keyword rankings (especially high-intent terms)

* Referring domains (quality over quantity)

* Leads generated from organic traffic



???? If you don’t think in metrics, this role isn’t for you.





## ? Who This Is NOT For



* Beginners

* “Content writers who do a bit of SEO”

* Anyone relying on outdated tactics

* People who need constant hand-holding



## ? Who This IS For



* Someone who has **actually ranked sites before**

* Someone who understands **how to build authority**

* Someone who can **execute, not just advise**

* Someone who treats this like **their own project**



## ???? Working Setup



* Remote

* Flexible

* Long-term opportunity across multiple projects



## ???? Compensation



* Competitive (based on experience)

* Performance-based upside available





## ?? Read This Before Applying



If you apply, include:



1. 2–3 websites you’ve ranked

2. Keywords you ranked them for

3. How you built backlinks (be specific)



???? If you don’t include this, your application will be ignored.

title: Experienced Graphic Designer / Photo Retoucher
description:
We’re hiring an experienced Graphic Designer and Photo Retoucher with real estate experience who understands how to create clean, professional, high-converting visuals across digital and print.



This role is for someone who knows how to design with clarity and purpose. You understand branding, layout, hierarchy, and how visuals influence attention and trust, especially in real estate marketing.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Team Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just managing marketing campaigns for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have real estate design experience and understand what makes listings visually credible and market-ready? Do you know how to design social posts and brochures that look clean, professional, and on-brand without overcomplicating them? Do you move fast when timelines are tight and still pay attention to spacing, alignment, and small details?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Social & Digital Design

- Design YouTube branding assets including thumbnails, banners, and episode graphics.

- Create Instagram listing posts, announcements, ads, and story graphics.

- Develop and maintain branded social templates for consistent output.



Print Design

- Design real estate yard signs and signage.

- Create listing brochures and marketing flyers.

- Prepare clean, print-ready files with correct sizing and bleed settings.



Real Estate Photo Editing

- Edit listing photos for lighting, color correction, and clarity.

- Clean up images by removing distractions and enhancing presentation.

- Ensure final images look professional while remaining realistic.



Brand Consistency & Organization

- Maintain consistent fonts, colors, and layout standards

- Ensure all visuals align with company branding

- Organize design files clearly for future use



Requirements:

- Proven experience in real estate graphic design, required

- Strong portfolio showing real estate social and print work, required

- Experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Lightroom), or similar tools

- Strong understanding of layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy

- Experience preparing print-ready files

- Experience editing real estate photos

- Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to follow brand guidelines

- A stable, high-speed internet connection

- Growth mindset



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Light motion graphics

- Understanding of social media performance metrics

- Basic copy awareness (headline spacing, readability, CTA placement)



NOTE: This is a project-based role with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.







STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Graphic Designer with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

Answer this question:

(Required)

We are looking for someone who wants a long-term role and takes ownership of their work.



If you do not have real ClickUp experience, this role is not a fit.

title: Healthcare Recruiter
description:
Job description:



We are a growing U.S.-based healthcare company seeking a Recruiter / Interview Specialist to support therapist hiring across multiple departments.



This role is call-heavy and interview-focused, with additional responsibility for coordinating hiring needs and tracking recruitment progress. Approximately 90% of your work will involve phone interviews with therapist candidates.



If you are not comfortable being on calls for most of your shift, this role is not a good fit.



Role Overview



• You will conduct daily phone interviews with licensed therapists (PT, OT, ST, PTA, COTA), coordinate with internal teams on hiring needs, and manage the recruitment pipeline from job posting through candidate handoff.

• You are the first point of contact for candidates and a key link between departments, so professionalism, organization, and communication are essential.



Key Responsibilities



• Interviewing & Screening (Primary Focus)

• Conduct high-volume phone interviews daily with therapist candidates.

• Screen candidates for: Licensure and credentials, Experience and specialties, Availability and geographic coverage,



Communication skills and professionalism

• Clearly explain roles, expectations, and next steps.

• Identify red flags and escalate concerns when necessary.

• Recruitment Coordination & Follow-Ups

• Follow up with candidates after interviews as needed.

• Coordinate with internal departments (staffing, operations, leadership) to understand current and upcoming hiring needs.

• Schedule next steps and hand off qualified candidates appropriately.

• Maintain timely and professional communication with candidates throughout the process.

• Job Posting & Process Tracking

• Post job openings on approved platforms as hiring needs change.

• Track candidates through each stage of the recruitment process.

• Keep recruitment trackers or ATS accurate and up to date.

• Provide basic updates on hiring progress when requested.



What We’re Looking For



• Comfortable being on the phone most of the workday.

• Clear, confident, professional speaking voice.

• Strong listening and judgment skills.

• Highly organized and detail-oriented.

• Able to manage follow-ups and coordination without losing 
ntum.



Qualifications



• 1–2+ years of experience in: Recruiting, Healthcare staffing, HR screening, Call center interviewing

• Excellent spoken and written English.

• Comfortable conducting multiple interviews per day.

• Familiar with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs).

• Bonus: Experience recruiting healthcare professionals or independent contractors.



Requirements



• Reliable internet connection.

• Quiet, professional work environment for calls.

• Ability to work U.S. (PST) business hours.

• Part-time or full-time availability (to be discussed).



How to apply



• Please send a brief cover letter outlining your experience that is aligned or related to the role you are applying for. Make sure to include the specific tasks you have handled, as well as the link to your resume.

• Kindly monitor your OLJ inbox, as I will send the final interview link and your schedule there if you are shortlisted for the position.





Benefits:



• Paid training

• Work from home



Experience:



• Recruiting: 2 years (Required)

• Healthcare Staffing: 1 year (Required)

• Work Location: Remote

Acquisition Ascension

s, blogs and social posts

title: Video Editor / Creative Strategist (Performance-Based Pay + Free Courses Included)
description:
The Role

You'll start by editing short-form video ads (UGC-style, direct response) using scripts, AI tools, and briefs we provide. Over time, you'll develop into a full Creative Strategist — learning how to research markets, develop angles, and build ad concepts from scratch.

Schedule & Time Zone

We don't care when you work — as long as your daily output is delivered and you make the Saturday strategy call. You manage your own hours.

Daily output: 1 ad concept with 3 video variations.

You'll use AI and structured prompts for scripting and iteration, upload deliverables to Google Drive, log everything in our tracking sheet, and join weekly strategy calls. This is a system — you follow the process, use the frameworks, hit your output, and you earn.

How You Get Paid

You earn 2.5% of the first $10,000 in spend generated by each ad concept you create.

That's up to $250 per winning concept.

At 5+ concepts per week, you're getting 20+ shots on goal every month. You don't need every concept to win. You need a few. And as your skill improves, your hit rate goes up — and so does your income.

There is no monthly cap. The more winners you produce, the more you make.

Revenue is tracked transparently in a shared sheet and payments are made bi-weekly.

And we offer $
fixed salary on top for anybody delivering promising work reliably.

What You Get Beyond Pay

Access to premium direct-response and copywriting courses (valued at thousands of dollars) — included free as part of the role

Hands-on training in performance creative strategy — the same skillset US agencies charge $5K–$15K/month for

AI-powered workflow — you'll work with cutting-edge AI tools for scripting, ideation, and review

A real path to growth — you're not stuck editing clips forever. You're building a skillset that compounds

Most editing roles pay you to stay in the same place. This one pays you to get better. You'll understand how ads are built, why they work, and how to create them from scratch. That knowledge compounds whether you stay with us long-term or go on to build something of your own.

This Role Is For You If…

You can edit video cleanly and quickly (Premiere, DaVinci, CapCut — whatever you're fast in)

You want to learn direct-response marketing, not just push pixels

You're reliable, consistent, and can hit a daily output target

You're excited by the idea of getting paid based on results, not hours

You want a long-term role where your earning potential grows as you grow

This Role Is NOT For You If…

You want a fixed salary with no performance component

You're not comfortable with a learning curve

You can't commit to consistent daily output

Final Notes

This is a performance culture.

You get rewarded for speed, output, and results.

If you want to make more, produce more, test more, win more.

The system is here to make sure your pay scales with your impact.

To Apply

Fill out this short form below and link any past work (ads, reels, edits — anything that shows you can cut video).

5. Escalate technical or unusual issues to senior support when needed

6. Inbound Phone Support (Customer Service and Sales)

7. Answer inbound calls professionally within 3 rings

8. Handle order status, tracking, shipping issues, and basic troubleshooting

9. Assist inbound sales calls with product recommendations, kit comparisons, and basic installation guidance

10. Explain value versus cost clearly and accurately

11. Log all calls properly in the CRM system





Order Management

1. Look up and manage orders using Shopify and ShipStation

2. Confirm tracking details, delivery status, and shipping exceptions

3. Create RMAs, replacement shipments, and internal notes when authorized

4. Follow fraud prevention and verification procedures



Product Knowledge Development

1. Learn the differences between horn kits, compressors, tanks, and mounting systems

2. Understand common installation issues and troubleshooting methods

3. Develop strong familiarity with top-selling products



Marketplace and Social Message Support (if assigned)

1. Respond to customer messages on
, Instagram, and TikTok Shop

2. Handle eBay and Amazon customer inquiries

3. Escalate refund demands, policy disputes, or chargeback concerns



Performance Expectations:

1.
 response time under 15 minutes

2. Minimum 95 percent ticket accuracy

3. Professional phone handling and proper documentation

4. Efficient issue resolution with minimal back-and-forth

5. Ability to convert inbound calls into sales when applicable



Qualifications:

1. Strong written and verbal English communication skills

2. Customer service or call handling experience preferred

3. Automotive or 12V electrical knowledge is an advantage

4. Comfortable handling sales conversations

5. High attention to detail and accuracy

6. Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: E-Commerce Platform Daily Operations Checker & Report Downloader
description:
About the Role



This is part-time remote position with potential to become full-time for the right person.

Your daily tasks will include:

Checking account health and performance across Amazon and other e-commerce platforms to ensure everything is functioning correctly and without red flags.



Daily data extraction: Download and organize business reports from Amazon and other platforms in a structured and consistent way.



File preparation and delivery: Upload all reports into our system every weekday between 5:00–9:00 AM CET, based on the data from the previous day.



This is a routine, high-trust task, and we expect 100% reliability, strong attention to detail, and zero tolerance for reporting mistakes. These reports are used to make business-critical decisions.



What We’re Looking For

Experience in downloading reports and data from Amazon Seller Central and other e-commerce platforms — this is a must.



Fluent and consistent in written communication in English.



Highly responsible and disciplined individual who can perform recurring tasks every weekday without fail.



Structured and organized, with good habits around file handling, naming conventions, and task documentation. If you are serious about this position please start your reply with daily discipline delivers results.



Ability to work independently, showing ownership and awareness of their role's importance to the business.



Willingness to learn and improve over time.



You must be available and reliable during European morning hours (5:00–9:00 AM CET), Monday to Friday.

title: Content Editor (Video + Social Proof) – For Established Education Brand
description:
Video Business Mastery helps established video business owners move from inconsistent, referral-led work to predictable, strategy-driven growth.



We are looking for a Content Editor to help us turn real client results into high-quality social proof content.



This is not a basic editing role. You will be working with:



Client testimonials

Zoom recordings

Sales call snippets

Written feedback from clients



Your job is to identify the most compelling 
nts and turn them into:



Short-form video clips (Instagram / ads)

Clean, well-designed story slides (Canva / Photoshop)

Simple, high-impact proof assets



This isn't just about editing clips, you need to recognise what actually makes someone stop and pay attention.



We are looking for someone who:



Can listen to long recordings and identify the strongest 
nts

Understands what makes a testimonial persuasive (not just “nice sounding”)

Has a good eye for clean, modern design (nothing cluttered or outdated)

Can follow structure, but also use judgment



Key Responsibilities:



Review long-form content (Zoom calls, testimonials)

Extract the most valuable and persuasive segments

Edit short-form video clips (30–90 seconds)

Create Instagram story slides from written or spoken testimonials

Organise and label content clearly for the team



Requirements:



Strong English comprehension (critical)

Experience with video editing (Premiere Pro or similar)

Experience with Canva or Photoshop

Good visual taste - simple, clean, modern

Ability to work independently and make decisions



Compensation:



Starting at one day per week. $40 per day.



Opportunity to grow into a long-term role.



How to Apply (IMPORTANT):



We will only review applications that follow these steps:



Send an
 to 



1. Subject Line

“Content Editor – [Your Name] – Proof Role”



2. Short Video (2-3 mins)

Explain:

Your experience with video editing

How you d
 what parts of a video are “worth using”



You can create this easily with 'Loom' or similar.



3. Portfolio

Send 3–5 examples of your:



Short-form videos

Social media graphics (if available)





If selected, we'll send you a short test task. A paid exercise.

We will send you a short recording. You will:

Select the 3 best 
nts

Edit 1 short clip

Create 1 Instagram story slide



Thank you and we look forward to your application.

title: Creative Strategist — Premium Lash & Cosmetics Brand
description:
We're not looking for someone who "knows marketing."

We're looking for someone who has actually scaled a brand to $100K/month or more and can do it again.

We're a fast-growing premium lash and cosmetics brand currently in our traction phase. We're running paid Meta ads, testing creatives daily, and building toward aggressive scale. The foundation is there. We need someone who knows exactly what to do next.



What you'll own:

Creative strategy from concept to script to brief

Identifying winning angles based on data not gut feeling

Building and testing new ad concepts every week

Running structured feedback loops to continuously improve creative performance

Analyzing Meta performance data and translating it into better creatives

Staying ahead of trends on TikTok, Instagram, and





What we're looking for:

Proven track record of scaling a brand to $100K/month or more this is non-negotiable

Deep understanding of Meta paid ads and creative testing frameworks

Knows how to run feedback loops this is a must, not a nice-to-have

Ability to write hooks and scripts that stop the scroll

Data-driven mindset you make decisions based on numbers, not opinions

Fluent in English strong written communication is essential



What we offer:

A brand with real 
ntum and a clear path to scale

Long-term partnership we grow together, you grow with us

Performance bonuses tied to winning concepts

A team that moves fast and takes creative seriously



How to apply:

Don't send a generic application. Show us a brand you've scaled, the creatives that worked, and why they worked. Numbers only. No fluff.

If you've never scaled a beauty brand to $100K/month this role is not for you.

title: Digital Marketing VA
description:

 with:

title: LinkedIn Engagement and Community Specialist
description:
Role Overview:



We are seeking a 
munity Manager with a proven track record to lead and enhance our social media presence on LinkedIn. This role is pivotal in driving brand visibility, fostering meaningful engagement, and contributing to business growth. You will work closely with our content and copywriting teams to transform content into engaging LinkedIn posts, strategically incorporating tags, hashtags, and other platform-specific features. If you are looking for a traditional "lead generation" role, this position is not for you.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Content Management: Collaborate with our content and copywriting teams to adapt and optimise content for LinkedIn, ensuring posts are engaging and aligned with our strategic goals. This includes selecting appropriate tags, hashtags, and other LinkedIn features to maximise reach and impact.

Engagement and Community Building: Actively engage with new and existing audiences by initiating conversations, tagging relevant individuals and organisations, and fostering meaningful interactions that drive brand awareness and community growth.

Trend Monitoring and Adaptation: Stay ahead of industry trends and LinkedIn platform updates, using insights to recommend new strategies and content formats that keep our brand relevant and engaging.

Performance Analysis: Regularly track and analyse LinkedIn metrics, providing actionable insights and reports to refine our content strategy and optimise engagement.

Collaborative Integration: Work seamlessly with internal teams to ensure LinkedIn initiatives align with broader marketing strategies, contributing to the overall success of our campaigns.

Profile Optimisation: Continuously review and optimise LinkedIn profiles to maximise visibility, reach, and impact across all our LinkedIn activities.

Responsive Communication: Manage inquiries and feedback on LinkedIn promptly and professionally, ensuring our community feels heard and valued.



Key Skills and Competencies:



LinkedIn Expertise: Deep understanding of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices, with at least 2 years of professional experience managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Content Optimisation: Ability to work with content and copywriting teams to turn content into engaging LinkedIn posts, utilising tags, hashtags, and other features to enhance visibility.

Analytical Mindset: Proficient in using LinkedIn metrics and analytics to drive performance improvements and inform content strategies.

Collaborative Spirit: Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams, integrating LinkedIn efforts with broader marketing and business goals.

Proactive and Trend-Focused: A keen eye for spotting emerging trends on LinkedIn and the initiative to implement them in our strategies.

Strong Communication: Excellent written communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity, creativity, and attention to detail.

Organisational Skills: Capable of managing multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while maintaining a high level of quality and consistency.



Qualifications and Experience:



Professional Experience: Minimum of 2 years managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

Platform Proficiency: In-depth knowledge of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices.

Content Optimisation: Experience in adapting and optimising content for LinkedIn to enhance engagement.

Analytical Skills: Demonstrable experience with LinkedIn metrics and analytics for performance tracking and improvement.

title: Junior Finance Assistant (Accounting Graduate)
description:
APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED

***Only complete submissions will be considered.***



Who we are:

Join our growing team at gigCMO Ltd, a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Position Overview:

As a Junior Finance Assistant at gigCMO Ltd, you will play a crucial role in ensuring our operations' financial integrity and efficiency. Reporting to the financial controller, you will be responsible for various financial and analytical tasks working closely with your Finance Associate colleague as well as the Controller, CEO and COO.



Key Responsibilities:

Perform project-specific financial analysis.

Verify and analyse the billing process for accuracy and timeliness.

Oversee accounts payable, including invoice and bill payments and other financial transactions.

Respond to financial queries and actively contribute to budget management.

Collaborate with the financial controller to optimise financial operations.

Process payroll efficiently.

Handle general accounting and month-end closing tasks.

Manage accounts payable and receivables.

Produce comprehensive financial reports.

Assist in external audits conducted by our UK accountants for Annual Accounts and Taxation.

Engage with clients professionally.

Audit all documents to ensure contracts and change orders have appropriate approvals, signatures, and accurate billing.

Participate in month and year-end processes.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date Expense sheets.



Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Accounting.

2+ years of experience in public accounting or related fields.

Experience and Certification in QuickBooks

Excellent communication and organisational skills.

Proficient in Excel, including pivot tables, v-lookup, data extracts, and analysis.

Unsurpassed accuracy and attention to detail.

Ability to work well under pressure and handle multiple concurrent demands.

Initiative to identify, prioritise, and implement necessary elements for the team's responsibilities.

Knowledge of UK VAT Taxation is a plus.

This full-time opportunity demands commitment and dedication. To apply, kindly fill out the application form using this link:

gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. - Exceptional attention to detail, particularly in software testing and quality assurance.

title: SEMrush Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us:

gigCMO is a growth consultancy that provides strategic marketing leadership to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance our clients' digital presence and performance, we heavily rely on SEMrush for data-driven insights and strategy development. We are seeking a SEMrush Specialist to manage our SEMrush platform, analyse its data, and provide actionable recommendations to optimise our clients' digital strategies.





Job Summary:

We are looking for an experienced SEMrush Specialist to oversee the management and analysis of SEMrush data, offering insights and recommendations to various internal teams. This role is critical for developing and refining SEO and digital marketing strategies, based on in-depth analysis of SEMrush data. The ideal candidate will be highly proficient in using SEMrush and have a strong understanding of SEO, PPC, and competitive analysis.





Key Responsibilities:



Manage and monitor the SEMrush platform to track SEO performance, keyword rankings, and overall site health for our clients.

Analyse SEMrush data, providing detailed reports on SEO, PPC campaigns, competitor analysis, backlink profiles, and content performance.

Develop and recommend strategies for improving organic search rankings, increasing website traffic, and optimising digital marketing efforts based on SEMrush insights.

Collaborate with content, SEO, and marketing teams to align strategies with SEMrush data, ensuring all digital efforts are data-driven.

Conduct keyword research using SEMrush to identify high-potential keywords and provide recommendations for content optimisation.

Identify and track competitors' activities, providing insights on their strengths and weaknesses using SEMrush competitive analysis tools.

Stay up to date with SEMrush updates, new features, and industry trends to ensure we are maximising the platform's potential.

Generate regular reports on SEMrush performance metrics for different teams, including SEO health, keyword movements, and traffic changes.

Offer training and support to internal teams on SEMrush best practices and usage to ensure everyone is leveraging the platform effectively.

Work with teams to ensure technical SEO issues flagged by SEMrush are addressed and resolved.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven experience in using SEMrush as a core tool for digital marketing analysis and strategy development.

Strong understanding of SEO, PPC, keyword research, and competitive analysis.

Ability to interpret SEMrush data and translate it into actionable insights and strategies.

Experience in creating reports and dashboards that effectively communicate SEMrush findings to various teams.

Familiarity with SEO best practices, on-page optimisation, and technical SEO.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to prioritise recommendations based on impact.

title: HubSpot Specialist
description:
•APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED•



About us:

gigCMO Ltd. is a HubSpot Gold Partner. We are dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Position Overview:

We are currently seeking an adept and proactive HubSpot Specialist to join our team. This role is pivotal in driving automation, streamlining workflows, optimising pipeline strategies, and refining reporting mechanisms within our HubSpot environment.





Key Skills and Responsibilities:



Automation Excellence:

•Lead the development and implementation of advanced automation solutions within HubSpot to streamline processes, increase efficiency, and reduce manual tasks.

•Utilise HubSpot's automation tools, such as workflows, sequences, and bots, to orchestrate seamless customer journeys, automate repetitive tasks, and improve lead management processes.

•Collaborate closely with tea
mbers to identify opportunities for automation across various departments and implement solutions to drive productivity gains.

•Continuously monitor and optimise automation performance, leveraging data insights to refine workflows and ensure maximum effectiveness.



Workflow Enhancement:

•Evaluate existing workflows in HubSpot and identify opportunities for optimisation and automation to improve operational efficiency and streamline business processes.

•Design and implement custom workflows to support cross-functional collaboration, automate repetitive tasks, enforce standard operating procedures, and ensure data integrity.

•Provide training and support to tea
mbers on HubSpot workflows, best practices, and system capabilities to drive user adoption, enhance productivity, and optimise the platform's use.

•Collaborate with colleagues to develop and implement workflow governance policies, standardisation guidelines, and continuous improvement initiatives to drive ongoing efficiency gains and process optimisation.



Pipeline Development Expertise:

•Lead the design, implementation, and optimisation of sales pipelines within HubSpot, ensuring alignment with business objectives and sales processes.

•Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to define lead scoring criteria, develop lead nurturing strategies, automate lead qualification processes, and accelerate sales cycle progression.

•Continuously monitor pipeline performance, identify bottlenecks, and propose solutions to improve pipeline velocity, conversion rates, and overall revenue generation.

•Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for sales pipelines, including standardised processes, workflows, and best practices to support scalability and consistency across the organisation.



Reporting Mastery:

•Generate a wide range of reports and dashboards in HubSpot to monitor key performance indicators, track campaign performance, evaluate customer engagement, and provide actionable insights for decision-making.

•Conduct thorough data analysis to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement and present findings clearly and concisely.

•Work closely with colleagues to understand reporting requirements, develop custom reporting solutions, and continuously refine reporting processes to meet evolving business needs.

•Collaborate with tea
mbers to develop automated reporting processes and scheduled reports to streamline data delivery and improve decision-making efficiency.



Qualifications:

•Proven experience in HubSpot administration and implementation, focusing on automation, streamlining workflows, optimising pipeline strategies, and refining reporting.

•HubSpot Certificate (REQUIRED)

•Minimum 2 years of experience

•Familiarity with specific HubSpot modules such as Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, Service Hub, Content Hub, Operations Hub, and Commerce Hub.

•Strong analytical skills and the ability to translate data into actionable insights.

•Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively across teams and departments.

•Detail-oriented with a proactive mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.



Application Requirements: This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job.

title: Merchandise Planner
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST

Salary: $280 per week





About the Role

We are seeking a commercially driven Merchandise Planner to join our team and play a key role in driving performance across a portfolio of premium global brands.



This role is responsible for managing Open-to-Buy (OTB), forecasting, and inventory strategy across both Wholesale and Direct-to-Consumer (eCommerce) channels. You will ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, with a strong focus on core product continuity and Never Out of Stock (NOS) execution.



You’ll also work closely with wholesale partners to support growth through data-driven insights, forecasting, and replenishment planning.



Key Responsibilities:



OTB Planning & Forecasting

- Develop and manage OTB across Wholesale and DTC channels

- Build seasonal and in-season forecasts by brand, category, and channel

- Align buy plans with sales targets, stock turn, and margin expectations

- Continuously reforecast based on performance and inventory position



Inventory & Stock Management

- Optimise stock levels across warehouse, ecommerce, and wholesale

- Drive allocation strategies to maximise sell-through and reduce risk

- Identify slow-moving stock and recommend actionable solutions

- Partner with Operations to ensure strong stock flow and availability



Core / NOS Product Management

- Own forecasting and replenishment strategy for core “Never Out of Stock” lines

- Ensure continuity of key styles with minimal stock-outs

- Analyse historical trends and forward demand to guide reorder decisions

- Collaborate with Buying and Supply Chain on repeat orders and timing



Wholesale Partner Management

- Monitor wholesale account performance and identify growth opportunities

- Deliver regular reporting on sales, stock levels, and sell-through

- Manage replenishment programs for core product ranges

- Partner with accounts on forecasting and inventory planning

- Prepare and deliver Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs)



Trade Reporting & Insights

- Deliver weekly trade reports across all brands and channels

- Provide clear, actionable commercial insights

- Identify risks and opportunities early

- Track KPIs including sell-through, stock turn, WOS, and margin



Skills & Experience

- 3–6+ years in Merchandise Planning or Inventory Planning

- Strong experience with OTB, forecasting, and stock planning

- Experience across Wholesale and DTC/eCommerce channels

- Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills

- Strong analytical mindset with commercial awareness



Key Attributes

- Commercially sharp and outcome-focused

- Data-driven but confident in decision-making

- Strong stakeholder management skills

- Proactive and solutions-oriented

- Thrives in a fast-paced environment



Why Join Us

- Work across a portfolio of premium global brands

- High-impact role with ownership from day one

- Opportunity to shape inventory strategy and commercial performance



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. What was the approximate monthly or seasonal OTB you managed, and across how many brands/categories?

Include the channels you planned for (Wholesale, DTC, or both)



2. How did you measure forecast accuracy in your role?

What actions did you take when performance was tracking below plan?



3. Provide one example where you directly improved a key KPI (e.g., stock turn, WOS, sell-through, or margin).

Include before vs after results (quantify if possible)



4. Describe how you managed replenishment for core/NOS lines.

How did you determine reorder timing and depth?



5. Advanced Excel / Data Application

Describe a specific Excel/Google Sheets model or tool you built that influenced planning decisions.

What problem did it solve?

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor - Cosmetics Brand
description:

We're a fast-growing premium lash and cosmetics brand currently in our traction phase. We're running paid Meta ads, testing creatives daily, and building toward aggressive scale. Every asset we produce needs to stop the scroll, hold attention, and convert.

Fast turnaround on creative iterations based on performance data

Maintaining brand consistency across all visual assets

Experience with animation is a strong plus

Eye for detail and understanding of what makes a visual convert, not just look good

Fluent in English strong communication is essential

Able to take a brief and execute without hand-holding



What we offer:

A brand with real 
ntum and a clear path to scale

Long-term partnership we grow together, you grow with us

Performance bonuses tied to winning creatives

A creative team that moves fast and takes execution seriously

Don't send a generic portfolio. Show us ads you've made that actually performed. Include the results if you have them. We want to see what you made and what it did.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description:
Work From Home | Night Shift (EST) | Full-Time / Part-Time 



Location: Remote (availability during EST business hours required) 

Employment Type: Full-Time or Part-Time 

Industry: Financial Technology | Online Payments | SaaS



About Us

Zift is a US-based fintech company providing payment solutions for SaaS and software businesses.

We work with international clients and are expanding our sales team.



About the Role

We’re looking for a motivated and confident Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing team.

If you enjoy talking to people, can handle cold calls, and want a stable long-term remote job with a US company — this is for you.

You will be the first point of contact with potential clients and play a key role in growing our business.



What You’ll Do

- Make cold calls to B2B clients

- Briefly present the product and assess client interest

- Schedule qualified appointments (discovery calls and demos) and smoothly hand off interested clients to the Account Executive team.

- Handle objections calmly and professionally

- Achieve daily, weekly, and monthly quotas for outreach (calls and
s) and qualified appointments set.

- Maintain accurate and timely records of all prospecting activities, client interactions, and lead statuses in the CRM system.



Who We’re Looking For

- Strong spoken English (clear and confident)

- Comfortable speaking on the phone for long periods

- Experience in cold calling / sales / appointment setting is a plus

- Friendly, confident, and positive attitude

- Goal-driven and motivated to earn bonuses

- Fast learner and coachable

- Access to a reliable, high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, quiet workspace suitable for professional calls.

- Familiarity with the B2B SaaS, financial technology, or online payments industries is a significant plus.

- Proven ability to work independently and meet quantifiable performance goals.



Work Schedule

- Must be available during US Eastern Time (EST) hours

- This is a night shift role (Philippine time)



Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive base salary 

- Performance bonuses 

- 100% remote work (no commute)

- Work with a US fintech company 

- Supportive and friendly team



How to Apply:

Send your resume along with a short video or voice introduction (1–2 minutes) about yourself. For your video or voice introduction, please briefly describe your cold-calling experience and provide a mini-pitch for a SaaS product (1-2 minutes total).

The hiring process may include a mock cold call and a written cold
 exercise, which are common assessment signals for the SDR role.

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller To Schedule Appointments About Our A.I. Receptionist
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 elite appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4-6/hour base (depending on experience).

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- Monthly bonuses.

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

title: Commercial Real Estate Appraisal Analyst
description:
**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link:





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Location: Remote (US hours)    



Type: Full-Time



Hours: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday



Salary: PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 (PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for MAI candidacy or proven US CRE track record)



 



About Pahroo



Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy delivers commercial real estate valuations and advisory services across US markets, with a focus on assets underlying debt and equity investments. We work across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, and retail. The team is small, the work is rigorous, and the standards are high.



Working Hours — Please Read Before Applying

This role operates on US Central Standard Time: 4:00 AM – 1:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday. If you are based outside the US, please confirm this works for your circumstances before applying. It is a firm requirement.



The Role



You will sit within the valuation team, producing and supporting appraisal reports across a mixed commercial portfolio. The work is analytical, deadline-driven, and detail-critical. Once onboarded, you will be expected to work with a real degree of independence, drawing on sound US market knowledge to produce defensible value conclusions.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who understands why a number is what it is, not just how to arrive at it.



What You Will Do



 - Conduct research using industry databases — CoStar, REIS, RCA, PwC Real Estate Investor Survey, and broker market reports — to gather and interrogate comparable market evidence

 - Analyse property-level financial data including income statements, rent rolls, reimbursement schedules, and occupancy statistics to develop well-supported value indicators

 - Prepare collateral monitoring reports for assets underlying debt and equity investments across office, industrial, multifamily, self-storage, retail, and other property types

 - Produce USPAP-compliant appraisal reports ready for lender, investor, or regulatory review

 - Identify data gaps and market anomalies; flag assumptions that materially affect value conclusions

 - Manage competing report deadlines accurately without compromising on quality

 



What We Need



Required



 - Minimum 5 years of commercial real estate appraisal or valuation experience

 - Demonstrated, hands-on experience in the US property market — no learning curve on market fundamentals

 - Proficiency in ANOW, Total, and Excel-based valuation modelling

 - Working knowledge of USPAP requirements and their practical application in report preparation

 - Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Finance, Economics, or a closely related field

 - Strong written English — reports require clear, accurate, and defensible reasoning

 



Advantageous



 - MAI designation (Appraisal Institute) or active candidacy

 - RICS membership — relevant for internationally-based candidates with demonstrable US market exposure

 - Familiarity with CoStar, REIS, or RCA analytics platforms

 - Experience across two or more distinct asset classes

 



What We Offer



 - Base salary PHP 80,000 – PHP 110,000 per month

 - PHP 100,000 – PHP 140,000 for candidates with MAI candidacy or a demonstrable US CRE track record across multiple asset classes — we pay up for the right experience

 - Fully remote position

 - Clear onboarding with defined expectations from day one



**IMPORTANT**

To apply for this role, only use this link: 





Direct messages via onlinejobs.ph are not accepted.

title: Illustrator & Animation skilled Storyteller
description:
Creative Illustrator & Motion Designer — Promo Punks



Full-Time | Remote | USD $1,350/month



Promo Punks is an Australian promotional products company that doesn't do boring. We're looking for a rare creative — someone who can draw, animate, edit, and make people care — to own our visual identity across social media and web.



This isn't a role where you follow templates. You'll concept, illustrate, animate, edit, and ship scroll-stopping content that drives real business outcomes. If your portfolio makes people pause mid-scroll, keep reading.



What you'll do:



- Create illustrated and animated content for social media ads (Meta, TikTok, YouTube), organic posts, and website assets

- Edit and produce short-form video content optimised for each platform

- Develop visual narratives that turn promotional products into something people actually want to engage with

- Take a brief — or sometimes just a loose idea — and turn it into a compelling piece from storyboard through to final delivery

- Maintain and evolve a consistent brand aesthetic while pushing creative boundaries



Skills & experience required:



- Outstanding illustration ability — character work, product illustration, editorial style, or a signature look that sets you apart

- Strong motion design and animation skills (After Effects, Animate, Rive, or equivalent)

- Solid video editing chops — you can cut, pace, and polish short-form content that performs (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, or equivalent)

- A natural instinct for storytelling — you understand pacing, hooks, and emotional beats, not just pretty frames

- Proven experience creating content for social media and paid advertising

- Self-directed — you manage your own time and hit deadlines without hand-holding

- A portfolio that genuinely impresses



Nice to have:



- Experience with e-commerce or product-based brands

- Familiarity with the Australian market

- Experience with AI-assisted creative workflows



Compensation:



USD $1,350 per month, full-time. We're based in Australia (Brisbane, AEST) so some timezone overlap is preferred but not mandatory.



To apply:



Send your portfolio and a short note explaining which piece in it best shows your ability to combine illustration, animation, and storytelling — and why.

title: Business Development Manager | Sell High-Value Wi-Fi Solutions Across APAC
description:
This is not a typical sales role. You’ll be selling a complete ecosystem of Wi-Fi tools, technologies, and professional services to customers who rely on performance, not guesswork. If you know how to own a pipeline, engage technical buyers, and close meaningful deals, this is where you step up.



About the Role



This is not a support role. This is a high-performance, end-to-end sales role in a rapidly growing, high-demand technology category.



We are looking for a commercially driven, technically confident Business Development Manager to sell a complete portfolio of Wi-Fi tools, technologies, and professional services across Australia and the Asia-Pacific region.



You will work across leading wireless solutions, from network design and validation tools through to enterprise-grade Wi-Fi technologies and professional services. This is a role where you are not just selling products, you are helping customers design, deploy, optimise, and future-proof their networks.



If you want to operate in a role where you can own revenue, build technical authority, and deliver real-world impact, this is it.



This is not a support role. This is a high-performance, end-to-end sales role in one of the fastest-growing areas of enterprise technology, wireless networking.



We are looking for a commercially driven, technically confident Business Development Manager to sell a complete portfolio of industry-leading Wi-Fi tools, enterprise technologies, and professional services across Australia and the Asia-Pacific region.



You will be working with globally recognised solutions including Sidos, Ekahau, NetAlly, iBwave, MetaGeek, Aruba Instant On, Cambium Networks, Nomadix, and 7SIGNAL, alongside high-value services such as predictive surveys, AP-on-a-stick validation, and network optimisation.



This is a role where you are not just selling products, you are helping customers design, deploy, troubleshoot, and optimise real-world wireless networks.



What You’ll Be Doing



Sell Across a Complete Wi-Fi Ecosystem that includes:

	•	Ekahau, iBwave and MetaGeek for Wi-Fi design, validation, and troubleshooting

	•	NetAlly and Sidos for advanced network testing, diagnostics, and performance visibility

	•	AP-on-a-stick (APOS) kits for real-world validation

	•	Kubicon and 7SIGNAL for proactive monitoring and user experience visibility

	•	Aruba Instant On, Cambium Networks, and Nomadix for wireless infrastructure and connectivity

	•	Professional services including predictive surveys, onsite assessments, and optimisation

	•	Combine tools, technologies, and services into complete, outcome-driven solutionsOwn the Revenue Engine



You will 

 • Manage the full sales cycle from enquiry through to close

 • Build and maintain a strong pipeline across APAC

 • Drive opportunities with urgency, structure, and commercial focus



Sell Across a Complete Wi-Fi Ecosystem

 • Position a portfolio that includes:

 • Industry-leading Wi-Fi tools for design, validation, and troubleshooting

 • Professional services including predictive surveys, onsite assessments, and optimisation

 • Wireless technologies and platforms from globally recognised vendors

 • Create bundled solutions that combine tools, services, and infrastructure



Engage at a Technical and Business Level

 • Work with IT teams, network engineers, and decision-makers

 • Solve challenges around coverage, capacity, interference, and performance

 • Translate technical capability into clear business outcomes



Collaborate with Experts

 • Work closely with engineers and project teams to scope and shape solutions

 • Align the right mix of tools, technologies, and services to each opportunity

 • Ensure seamless transition from sale to delivery



Drive Long-Term Growth

 • Build strong relationships with customers and partners

 • Identify expansion opportunities across the network lifecycle

 • Drive renewals, upgrades, and repeat business



Stay Accountable and Data-Driven

 • Maintain a clean, accurate CRM pipeline

 • Forecast with confidence and consistency

 • Track performance across deals, conversions, and revenue



What You Bring



Sales Performance

 • 3+ years in Business Development, Inside Sales, or technical sales

 • Proven ability to close deals and consistently hit targets

 • Strong ownership mindset, you take responsibility for results



Technical Confidence

 • Experience in Wi-Fi, networking, or related infrastructure

 • Comfortable discussing wireless technologies, tools, and performance

 • Ability to bridge technical detail with commercial value



Commercial Thinking

 • You know how to position solutions, not just products

 • You can combine tools, services, and technologies into higher-value deals

 • Strong instinct for identifying and converting opportunities



Execution & Communication

 • Highly organised and proactive

 • Strong follow-through across multiple deals

 • Clear communicator across both technical and business audiences



Why This Role Stands Out

 • Sell a complete Wi-Fi ecosystem, not just a single product line

 • Work with globally recognised technologies and platforms

 • Be part of a space where demand is strong and growing across APAC

 • Uncapped earning potential aligned to your performance

 • Remote flexibility with a high-performance culture

 • Collaborate with certified engineers and experienced technical teams



Who This Is For



Someone who wants to step into a true solution sales role.

Someone who wants to sell technology that engineers trust and businesses rely on.

Someone who is competitive, accountable, and driven to win.



If you want a role where you can build credibility, close meaningful deals, and accelerate your career, this is it.
