Expertise in enhancing CRM databases for effective Business Development Representative (BDR) outreach, while ensuring data accuracy and system optimization, is essential. A proven track record of streamlining sales processes and improving sales outcomes is a must.



Main Responsibilities:



Lead Enrichment & Data Management: Manage and optimize lead enrichment processes, including data management, system analysis, and ongoing lead quality checks.

HubSpot CRM Management: Oversee CRM management, including assisting with lead assignment and reassignment to the sales team, ensuring all records are up-to-date and relevant.

Lead Enrichment Research: Use Apollo and LinkedIn to research and enrich leads with relevant information to increase outreach success.

Data Quality & Cleanup: Monitor and maintain data quality, deduplicate records, and address inconsistencies in the CRM.

Reporting & Dashboards: Develop and maintain performance reports and dashboards to track key metrics and provide insights for the sales and marketing teams.

Tool Integration & Reporting: Integrate with sales tools such as RingCentral to ensure in-sync, accurate reporting across platforms.

Lead Scrubbing & Accuracy: Proactively crawl new leads and scrub them for accuracy and relevance.

Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in current HubSpot workflows, recommend, and implement process improvements.

Support & Ad-Hoc Analysis: Provide support for ad-hoc data analysis requests, task creation for BDRs, and lead follow-ups.

Cross-Department Collaboration: Work closely with sales, marketing, and operations teams to streamline communications and data handoffs.

Minor Responsibilities:



Facilitation & Communication: Participate in calibration sessions and meetings to ensure clear and effective communication across departments.

BDR Support: Maintain open communication with BDRs to address inquiries and provide ongoing support for lead-related activities.

Team Training & Development: Help train new tea
mbers, providing continuous guidance and support to ensure their long-term success.

KPI & Reporting: Report on KPIs, tools, and overall department performance to key stakeholders.

Requirements

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Business Management, Entrepreneurship, or other related fields.

Required Work Experience:



1-2 years of experience in lead generation, data management, or B2B sales.

At least 6 months of experience with CRM platforms, ideally HubSpot.

1-2 years in client success or end-to-end sales experience is preferred.

Hands-on experience with Zapier integration for sales workflows and automation.

Hard Skills:



Data Management: Proficiency in organizing and maintaining data.

System Analysis: Ability to analyze and optimize systems to improve lead enrichment and management processes.

CRM Management: Expertise in CRM management, particularly with HubSpot.

Lead Enrichment: Experience with enriching leads using tools like Apollo and LinkedIn.

Data Quality Assurance: Proactive approach to scrubbing and ensuring the accuracy of leads and CRM data.

Research Skills: Strong ability to gather and interpret relevant information for lead enrichment.

Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze data and draw actionable insights for decision-making.

Zapier Integration: Proficiency in using Zapier for automating workflows and integrating tools to improve team efficiency.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.



Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Interior Designer
description:
About Us

We are a high-end, rapidly scaling U.S.-based interior design firm that works with luxury real estate developers, builders, agents, and discerning homebuyers. Our approach blends luxury design with practical, turnkey solutions, leveraging curated vendor partnerships and photo-realistic 3D visualization. We operate at the intersection of high-end design and data-driven operations to maximize our reach and impact.



Role Overview

We're looking for a talented interior designer who takes real pride in their work and thrives in a fast-moving environment. This is a creative role, but speed and efficiency matter as much as the quality of the output. You'll take design direction and run with it, translating concepts into polished, client-ready presentations while keeping multiple projects moving at once. We can get you up to speed on our tools and workflow, but taste, attention to detail, and the drive to make every project genuinely beautiful - that has to come with you.



We're also building a design team that stays ahead of the curve. That means actively using AI and emerging tools to work smarter, produce faster, and push the quality of our output higher. If you get excited about what new technology makes possible in design, you'll fit right in here.



Key Responsibilities

* Design Concepts: Develop design concepts drawing from our curated vendor catalog or our own previous collections, creating cohesive looks that reflect each client's space and aesthetic

* Presentations: Build concept boards, material samples, and design plans that tell a clear visual story, then present those concepts to clients and gather feedback

* 3D Modeling: Create and complete SketchUp models of rooms and furniture that feed into our 3D Artist team for final client renderings

* Project Management: Own your projects from design through handoff to our fulfillment team, stepping in when swaps are needed and following up with clients after install

* Project Organization: Keep project files, design selections, and procurement trackers organized and current so nothing falls through the cracks



What You Bring

* A strong design eye and genuine passion for interior design. Degree or formal training in interior design is required and your portfolio should speak for itself

* Excitement about using AI tools and a track record of adopting new technology to work more efficiently

* The ability to juggle multiple projects simultaneously, hit tight deadlines, and communicate clearly when priorities shift

* A collaborative working style. This team wins together and everyone contributes

* Proficiency in SketchUp for room and furniture modeling

* Polished written and spoken English, clear and professional in client-facing settings and team collaboration

* Alignment with our company core values (listed below)



Our Company Core Values

RELATE: Humility, collaboration, and fun in everything we do

DELIVER: Strong work ethic and personal accountability

DELIGHT: Commitment to exceptional client experiences

DISCOVER: Passion for innovation and continuous learning



Schedule

This is a full-time role. We're flexible on hours but ask that you have meaningful overlap with our U.S. Pacific Time mornings and availability during Philippine overnight hours to collaborate with the team.

title: Product Analytics Manager (Amplitude)
description:
We’re a growing digital business looking for an experienced Amplitude analytics specialist to take day-to-day ownership of our product analytics. We already have a structured tracking setup and dedicated CRO team. Your role will be to maintain, improve, and monitor our Amplitude implementation - ensuring experiments are set up correctly, data is accurate, and performance issues are identified early. This is a long-term, stable remote role with real ownership.



What You’ll Do

- Own and manage our Amplitude workspace

- Maintain and enforce tracking plans

- Set up and validate A/B tests designed by our CRO team

- Ensure experiments are tracking correctly before and after launch

- Build and maintain dashboards used across the business

- Monitor traffic and conversion performance across global markets

- Analyse performance by country, device, browser and user type

- Spot anomalies, tracking issues or revenue-impacting problems

- Work closely with product and developers to maintain clean event data



What We’re Looking For

- Minimum 1 year hands-on experience using Amplitude

- Experience setting up Amplitude for websites or products

- Experience creating dashboards and reports

- Experience supporting or implementing A/B tests

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working independently

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Available to work full UK business hours



About Us

- Fully remote team

- Small, fast-moving digital business

- Multiple global websites and products



What We Offer

- Competitive salary including 13th month pay

- Paid holiday including all local holidays

- Stable long-term job

- Opportunity to grow with the company



How to Apply

Alongside your CV, please include:

- A brief example of an Amplitude project you’ve worked on

- A dashboard you’ve created (screenshots welcome)

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter For Medspa Marketing Agency
description:
We are hiring an Appointment Setter / Cold Caller for our agency that helps medspas and aesthetic clinics grow using paid ads and AI infrastructure.



Your main role will be to call cold leads from our CRM and book qualified prospects into a Zoom discovery call with our sales team. You will not be responsible for closing deals. Our team handles the sales calls and closes the clients. Your job is to start conversations, follow the script/process, handle basic objections, and get the appointment booked.



What we provide:

- All leads are provided

- Leads are already loaded into our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

- Phone number and calling/software tools are provided

- You do not need to source your own leads



Requirements:

- Previous experience in cold calling, appointment setting, telemarketing, or sales

- Must be 100% fluent in English with no accent

- Confident speaking on the phone with business owners

- Strong communication and follow-up skills

- Comfortable working inside GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM

- Must have your own computer/laptop and reliable internet

- Ready to start ASAP



Schedule:

Minimum 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST

Minimum 5-6 days per week



Compensation:

Salary, or

Base salary + commission



To apply, please send a voice recording via Whats App to 1 - 9o2 83o 44 85

- Your resume showing previous cold calling experience

- A short voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your experience.

- Your expected hourly pay



We are looking for someone reliable, hungry, and experienced who can help our team consistently book qualified discovery calls.

title: Virtual Marketing Assistant
description:
About Jumper Media



At Jumper Media, we help local businesses grow through smart, human-first social media marketing. From lead generation to brand storytelling, our work turns ad clicks into real conversations—and real conversions. Based in San Diego, we’ve supported thousands of clients across industries with content, strategy, and SEO that actually works. Follow us on 
 and 
 to see what we’re all about.



The Role:



We’re hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to engage with leads generated from our paid social campaigns. You’ll be managing community interactions on Jumper Media’s brand channels, building authentic connections, and turning attention into trial sign-ups for our services. This is a front-facing role focused on thoughtful, human outreach—not spammy DMs or generic scripts.



What You’ll Do:



Monitor paid social ads on Jumper Media’s brand Instagram and
 for new likes, follows, and engagement

Visit user profiles, like recent posts, and leave relevant, personalized comments

Start and manage DM conversations with leads—encouraging trial sign-ups for Jumper’s services

Log all outreach and track progress in a CRM

Use a consistent voice aligned with Jumper’s brand tone and social strategy

Work toward a clear conversion goal: turning engagements on our ads into trial sign-ups



What We’re Looking For:



1+ year experience in sales, customer service, or social media community management

Deep familiarity with internet/social media culture and engagement patterns

Fluent written English (Spanish a bonus)

Excellent written communication. You write like a human, not a bot

Reliable, organized, and highly self-motivated

Full-time availability (approx. 30–40 hours/week)

Flexible hours and schedule; bonus for overlapping with San Diego (PST) time.

Comfortable following structured workflows and tracking results



Compensation:

$500 USD/month (flat rate)

30–40 hours per week



Apply by sending your resume to 
 & help us turn clicks into conversations.

This role includes outbound calling, inbound call handling, appointment setting, and customer service.



???? While this is a well-rounded role, cold calling is a key part of our growth, so we are specifically looking for someone who enjoys being on the phone and converting new opportunities into bookings.

Business owners (salons, clinics, daycares, clubhouses, etc.)

Convert leads into booked appointments

title: Shopify CRO Expert & Liquid Developer
description:
About Us:

We are a growing e-commerce brand specializing in gourmet filled cookies. We are looking to scale our online sales and need a conversion-obsessed expert to optimize our Shopify store.



The Role:

We need a proactive Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist who is highly proficient in Shopify Liquid. You won't just identify what is underperforming; you will jump directly into the code to fix it.



Key Responsibilities:



Analyze & Optimize: Track user behavior via analytics and heatmaps to identify friction points and boost CVR and AOV.



Develop in Liquid: Directly customize our Shopify theme using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to improve layout and page speed.



A/B Testing: Formulate hypotheses and run tests on product pages, checkouts, and landing pages.



What We Are Looking For:



Proven, hands-on CRO experience specifically for Shopify e-commerce brands.



Strong technical skills in Shopify Liquid (no need to rely on a separate developer).



Deep understanding of e-commerce buyer psychology and UX/UI best practices.



Bonus: Experience with Figma for creating wireframes and UI mockups.



Bonus: Experience using 
 for setting up and running advanced A/B tests.



How to Apply:

Please send your application with the following:



Links to 2-3 Shopify stores you have worked on, noting the specific CRO changes you made and the impact on revenue/CVR.



Include the word "Dough" in your subject line so we know you read this post.

title: Warm Lead Caller – Own the Lead Flow | US Hours + Weekends | Base + Commission
description:
Every lead that comes in has already shown interest.

Your job is to make sure none of them slip.



At Acquisition Ascension, we’re hiring a Warm Lead Caller / Appointment Setter to take full ownership of inbound leads — from first contact to confirmed attendance.



You’re not chasing strangers.

You’re managing people who are already in motion.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Call new leads as soon as they come in

Qualify and book leads who haven’t scheduled yet

Confirm appointments and set clear expectations

Call leads again ~1 hour before their appointment

Keep CRM updated with accurate notes and status

Stay consistent during US time zones + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

Warm, high-intent leads only

Proven scripts and systems already built

A role where reliability = income growth



You’re a Good Fit If You:

Speak clear, confident English

Have experience in calling, setting, or sales

Don’t let leads sit — you act fast

Can commit to US hours and weekend coverage

Are consistent, organized, and accountable

Take ownership over results, not just tasks



How to Apply:

Send a Loom (1–2 mins):



Your experience with warm lead calling

Your availability (US hours + weekends)

How quickly you respond to new leads



We’re hiring one person to own this function.

If you’re reliable and don’t let opportunities slip — apply now.



— Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Warm Caller / Appointment Setter – Structured Role | US Hours + Weekends
description:
If you prefer working with people who already want the call, this role is for you.



At Acquisition Ascension, we’ve built a system where leads come in already interested. Your role is to follow a clear process: call, qualify, confirm, and ensure they show up.



No guesswork.

No cold outreach.

Just execution.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Call inbound leads who have shown interest

Book appointments for leads who haven’t scheduled yet

Confirm bookings and make sure leads are prepared

Call leads again ~1 hour before the appointment

Track everything cleanly inside the CRM

Stay active during US time zones + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commissions

Base added after short, paid probation

Consistent lead flow

Scripts, CRM, and process already set up

Stable, repeatable work — not random tasks



You’re a Fit If You:

Speak fluent English and communicate clearly

Have experience with appointment setting or inbound calls

Are comfortable working US hours and weekends

Are organized and consistent with follow-ups

Prefer structure over chaos

Want a role you can rely on long-term



How to Apply:

Send a Loom (1–2 mins):



Your calling / setting experience

Your availability

Why you prefer warm leads over cold calling



We’re hiring one setter.

If you want consistent work with a clear system and real upside — apply now.



— Pranav

title: EXPERIENCED SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexi Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflow

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: General Admin Assistant & Social Media Management
description:
Join The Collaborative Co. - a fast-growing boutique Virtual Assistant agency supporting small businesses, solo entrepreneurs, and service providers across Australia.



We are looking for a General Admin Assistant & Social Media Manager to support our client in the manufacturing and marine industry. This is a varied, ownership-focused role suited to someone proactive, organised, and comfortable working independently. You will support operational, administrative, and marketing-related tasks while helping build systems and processes as the business grows.



In the first 30 days, you will focus on setting up PandaDoc workflows while supporting a CRM setup in parallel. You will work closely with the business owner and an external contractor to help build efficient, scalable systems. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys taking initiative, building processes, and supporting business operations long-term.



Key Responsibilities



Operations & Systems

Set up and maintain PandaDoc workflows including branding, catalogue, and pricing

Manage quote-to-invoice workflow

Support CRM setup and maintain
 templates

Build and maintain centralized digital filing system for orders and invoices

Create and maintain organized documentation across brands



Finance & Reporting

Update product costs in Xero

Cross-check invoices for accuracy

Generate reports as requested

Produce weekly dealer status reports

Review monthly floorplan invoices and cross-check against records



Marketing & Content Support

Plan social media content calendar across multiple brands

Edit spec sheets and branded materials in Canva

Assist with social media planning (posting handled by business owner initially)



Website & E-Commerce Support

Maintain Shopify online store

Handle basic website updates across platforms

Support general website maintenance



Photo & File Management

Organize and categorize photo library

Maintain structured file management system



Future Projects

Dealer portal setup for ordering and tracking

SOP creation across business operations

Process improvement initiatives



Qualifications and Skills

- Minimum 2 to 3 years Virtual Assistant or relevant experience

- Strong organisational and attention to detail skills

- Proactive and solutions-focused mindset

- Comfortable working with minimal SOPs initially

- Ability to learn quickly and work independently

- Strong written communication skills

- Honest, reliable, and transparent communicator

- Industry experience is not required. A willingness to learn and grow is highly valued



Tools You Will Use

PandaDoc, Pipedrive, Xero, Canva, Shopify, Squarespace, WordPress, Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Slack, WhatsApp





Hours & Schedule

Part-time role

20 hours per week

Work aligned with Brisbane timezone



Work Requirements

Reliable internet connection

Quiet working environment

Ability to attend virtual meetings

Strong attention to detail and organisation

Location: Remote



If you believe that you are fit for this role and is interested to apply, please complete our application form here:

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Join the Team as a Senior  Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

-time editor who can join ASAP!

 your best work where it shows quality edits

title: Operations Assistant
description:
WORK ARRANGEMENT



I. Working Hours

Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM-6:00 PM, PH Time

Saturday: 9:00 AM-1:30 PM, PH Time



II. Salary: $400/month



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Operations Assistant with strong Google Sheets / Excel skills to support day-to-day business operations, including HR processes, manage internal systems, and assist with technical setups.



JOB SCOPE

I. HR & Coordination

    1. Create and maintain Google Sheets trackers (e.g. payroll, internal dashboards)

    2. Coordinate onboarding of new hires (VAs)

    3. Conduct onboarding calls and guide tool setup

    4. Track attendance, leaves, and working hours

    5. Process payroll data every cutoff

    6. Respond to internal HR-related questions



II. Tech & Tool Support

    1. Help tea
mbers with tools and technical setups

    2. Coordinate system requests across teams



III. General Support

    1. Assist Operations Manager with ad hoc operational requests

    2. Coordinate with team leads and internal stakeholders



IV. Requirements

    1. Strong Google Sheets skills (comfortable with formulas and organizing data)

    2. Highly organized and detail-oriented

    3. Good written and spoken English

    4. Able to handle multiple tasks and priorities

    5. Proactive and able to follow through without constant supervision



V. Bonus (Nice to Have)

    1. Experience in HR or employee management

    2. Familiarity with LLMs (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini)

    3. Basic technical knowledge (VPS, domains, automation tools)



VI. Requirements (MUST HAVE)

    1. Advanced Google Sheets / Excel skills and able to work with complex formulas such as:

        ARRAYFORMULA, QUERY, FILTER, VLOOKUP / XLOOKUP, IMPORTRANGE, IFERROR / nested logic, REGEX functions, Date-based calculations

    2. Able to debug and improve existing spreadsheet systems

    3. Strong logical thinking and problem-solving ability



Technical Requirements

CPU - i5 or better

Memory (RAM) - 16GB (minimum), 32GB or more (ideal)

Internet Speedtest - 50+ Mbps (download) | 20+ Mbps (upload)

Note: Stable electricity and internet connection is required (with a backup plan to ensure uninterrupted work)

title: Senior / Lead Full Stack Developer (Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a Senior / Lead Full Stack Developer to take ownership of our core platform.

This is a hands-on leadership role — you’ll be building features, mentoring developers, and driving execution across development, QA, and releases.



What You’ll Do

- Build and improve features across frontend and backend

- Work within a large, existing codebase

- Mentor and guide junior developers

- Manage sprint priorities and help plan work

- Review code and ensure high quality standards

- Troubleshoot and resolve production issues

- Work closely with product/business on requirements



Leadership & Ownership Responsibilities:

- Own and manage the release process end-to-end

- Oversee QA processes, ensuring proper testing before deployment

- Train and upskill developers to improve team performance

- Participate in and support hiring new developers when needed

- Help define development standards and best practices



What We’re Looking For

- Strong in Python (Flask or similar frameworks)

- Solid experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS

- Strong SQL skills

- Experience working on live production systems

- Comfortable working with complex / legacy systems



Important Traits

- Strong leadership and decision-making ability

- High ownership and accountability

- Focuses on practical, efficient solutions (doesn’t over-engineer)

- Clear communicator who asks the right questions

- Can balance speed, quality, and priorities effectively



Details

- Fully remote

- Must overlap with EST working hours

title: Media Buyer for Meta / Google
description:
About Us

We are a growing health and wellness supplement brand focused on delivering high-quality, research-backed products that help our customers achieve their optimal wellbeing. Our mission is to empower individuals on their health journey through premium supplements and evidence-based education. We're passionate about transparency, quality, and putting our customers' needs first.

Position Overview

We are seeking an experienced and results-oriented Media Buyer specializing in Meta Ads and Google Ads platforms to join our dynamic marketing team. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of managing successful paid advertising campaigns in the health and wellness space, optimizing performance metrics, and driving customer acquisition while maintaining compliance with advertising policies for supplement brands. You will be instrumental in scaling our digital presence and driving direct-to-consumer sales through targeted advertising strategies.



Key Responsibilities



Develop and implement comprehensive paid media strategies across Meta 
, Instagram) and Google Ads platforms aligned with our supplement product launches and promotions

Create, launch, and optimize campaigns with a focus on customer acquisition, retention, and ROAS targets

Navigate and maintain compliance with advertising policies specific to health and supplement brands

Perform regular budget pacing analysis and make data-driven recommendations for spend allocation

Monitor campaign performance daily, identifying trends and optimization opportunities

Conduct A/B testing of ad creatives, copy, audiences, and landing pages to maximize conversion rates

Build and refine target audiences based on health interests, behaviors, and customer profiles

Implement and optimize funnel-based retargeting strategies to capture customers throughout their buying journey

Maintain detailed documentation of campaign strategies, performance, and learnings

Prepare regular performance reports and present insights to leadership team

Stay current with platform updates, health and wellness industry trends, and best practices

Collaborate with creative, content, and product teams to develop compliant, high-performing ad assets



Qualifications



3+ years of hands-on experience managing Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns, with at least 1 year experience in health, wellness, or supplement industry

Demonstrated success in driving measurable results through paid social and search campaigns for direct-to-consumer brands

Experience navigating Meta and Google advertising policies for health supplements and restricted content

Strong analytical skills with experience in performance analysis and optimization

Proficiency with ad platform tools, analytics software, and tracking implementations

Experience with conversion tracking, pixel implementation, and attribution modeling

Working knowledge of UTM parameters and campaign tracking methodologies

Understanding of customer lifetime value and subscription-based business models

Familiarity with A/B testing frameworks and statistical significance

Experience with automation tools and bid strategies a plus

Excellent communication and presentation skills

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or related field preferred



Technical Skills



Meta Ads Manager and Business Manager

Google Ads and Google Analytics

Google Tag Manager

Microsoft Excel/Google Sheets (advanced)



Application Process

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and a brief portfolio highlighting your most successful advertising campaigns, including specific metrics and results achieved. Selected candidates will be invited to complete a practical assessment demonstrating their campaign strategy and optimization skills.



Please submit this application form, serious inquiries only:

title: Paid Media Specialist
description:
Paid Media Specialist (Search + Social) — Reporting + Optimization

Remote — Philippines



Time Zone: Must overlap 4 hours/day with US Eastern Time (ET)



About SocialScience



SocialScience is a growth marketing agency managing paid search and paid social for high-growth brands across B2B and DTC. We specialize in performance-driven creative testing and media strategy designed to reduce CAC and scale revenue.



We’re hiring a Paid Media Specialist who can own performance + reporting across platforms.

This is not a virtual assistant role — this is a performance marketing role for someone who understands ad platforms, optimization, and how to turn numbers into clear next steps.



Role Overview



You’ll be responsible for two things:



Own the weekly reporting + insights engine across clients (clean, consistent, decision-ready data)



Support and execute campaign optimization (help scale winners, cut losers, and maintain clean account structure)



You’ll work closely with our media buying and strategy team. Over time, you’ll help strengthen cross-client insights, creative performance tracking, audit prep, and budget pacing systems.



What You Will Do

A) Reporting & Analytics (Core Responsibility)



Pull performance from:



Google Ads



Meta Ads Manager



LinkedIn Campaign Manager



TikTok Ads Manager



Google Analytics (GA4)



Update standardized reporting across all clients 3x per week (Mon/Wed/Fri)



Maintain clean, accurate master sheets and templates



Build and maintain pivot tables and summaries for:



CPA/CPL trends, CTR, CPC, CVR, ROAS



Creative performance and audience performance



Budget pacing by platform



Flag unusual performance shifts and highlight what likely caused them



B) Paid Media Support & Optimization



Assist with building and maintaining campaign structure for clean testing



Prepare data and insights before optimization sessions



Help turn off losers and scale winners using clear rules



Keep ad accounts organized and standardized (naming, budgets, structure)



Support weekly performance updates: spend, leads, CPL/CPA vs target, and next steps



C) Audit & Case Study Preparation



Pull last 60–90 days of structured data for audits and strategy reviews



Maintain “before vs after” performance snapshots for case studies



Organize campaign structure and performance notes for review



D) Creative & Audience Insights (Advanced / Growth Path)



Track top-performing creatives and audiences across accounts



Maintain a creative performance library



Spot repeatable patterns across clients that inform testing strategy



What Success Looks Like



Reporting is clean, consistent, and decision-ready every Mon/Wed/Fri



Media buyers have the numbers and insights they need before optimizations



Performance issues are flagged early (no surprises)



Accounts stay organized — no messy, fragmented structures



Tests are documented, learnings are clear, and next moves are always visible



Requirements



2–3+ years experience working inside paid ad platforms (agency or in-house)



Strong working knowledge of:



Meta Ads Manager + Google Ads (must-have)



LinkedIn Campaign Manager and/or TikTok Ads (strong plus)



GA4 (must-have)



Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills:



Pivot tables (required)



Formulas, data hygiene, structured reporting



Deep understanding of:



CPA/CPL, CPC, CTR, CVR, ROAS



Campaign ? Ad Set/Ad Group ? Ad structure



How to interpret performance signals and trends



Extremely detail-oriented and process-driven



Clear communicator in English (written + spoken)



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



Looker Studio / Data Studio



Supermetrics or data connectors



UTMs and tracking structure



Working Style Expectations



Daily check-ins (Slack/ClickUp)



Review accounts and data every working day



Hit deadlines without being chased



Flag issues early with proposed solutions



Comfortable managing multiple clients at once



90-Day Ramp



We’ll train you on our client avatars, offers, and internal systems.

Within 90 days, you should be confidently owning reporting + performance support, with clear weekly insights and strong account hygiene.



How to Apply



Send your application to: 



Include:



Resume + Portfolio (case studies or screenshots welcomed — blur sensitive info)



A short story: a significant event in your life that shaped you





See you!

title: Sales & Operations Manager
description:
Company: The Everyday Cleaners, Seattle, WA. YOUR JOB HUNT STOPS HERE! This will be like no other place you have ever worked before. 



This is not your typical virtual assistant role...



This is an opportunity to become a key operator inside a fast-growing cleaning company.

We’re not just looking for someone to “help out.”

We’re looking for someone who wants to own results, make money, and grow with the business.



If you perform, you will be rewarded. Simple as that.



Who are we?



We are The Everyday Cleaners, a House Cleaning Company based out of Seattle, WA, USA. We coordinate cleaning jobs between our customers and our team of cleaners.

Seeking our next A+ Tea
mber.



Who are we looking for?



We are seeking an experienced Sales & Operations Manager to join our team. We want someone who is goal-oriented, and hungry for success. This role offers an opportunity to level up your career and skillset, with a focus on continuous learning and improvement. Ideally you speak strong English, and have previous Sales & Operations Manager experience.



Why should you work here?



This is a massive opportunity to start working for a company right before it gets HUGE.

This is an exciting place to work where not only do you get a fully remote position, but there is ample opportunity for growth and Career Advancement.



Starting Pay:



$125 USD per week

20 Hours per week (Wednesday - Sunday PST)

5 hours per day



Responsibilities:

-Closing inbound calls and convert leads into booked jobs

-Cold call businesses, property managers, and real estate agents 

-Assigning cleans with cleaners 

-Handling clean operations (dispatching cleaners, confirmations, bookings, etc.)

-Track leads, conversations, and deals in our system



Requirements:

- Prior experience as a Sales & Operations Manager for a Cleaning Company. 

- Good personality and ability to work independently.

- Strong communication and organizational skills.

- Strong english 

- Stable internet connection and reliable laptop/PC.



How to Apply:

Please message your resume via OnlinejobsPh

title: Inventory Planner & Merchandiser (Ecommerce)
description:
Overview



We are a fast-growing ecommerce business managing multiple brands across Amazon and other online channels. We are looking for a highly analytical Inventory Planner & Merchandiser to manage stock levels, forecast demand and ensure we maximise sales while avoiding overstock and stockouts.



This role is critical to ensuring the right products are in stock, at the right time, across all key markets and seasonal periods.



Key Responsibilities



 Sales & Forecast Analysis



 • Analyse weekly sales performance vs forecast across all products

 • Identify trends in fast-moving and slow-moving SKUs

 • Highlight risks such as under-forecasting, overstocking or declining sales



Market-Level Stock Planning (UK & EU)



 • Analyse sales split between UK and EU marketplaces 

 • Determine where stock is required based on market demand and sales trends

 • Ensure correct allocation of inventory between UK and EU warehouses

 • Identify opportunities to rebalance stock between regions to maximise sales and availability



Stock Planning & Management



 • Monitor stock levels and weeks of cover across all SKUs

 • Identify products at risk of selling out or overstocking

 • Ensure stock is aligned with sales velocity, geography and seasonality





Supply Chain & Delivery Tracking



 • Track inbound shipments and highlight delays or risks to availability

 • Ensure stock arrives at the right time for seasonality and demand peaks

 • Work closely with suppliers and internal teams to resolve issues





Merchandising & Commercial Planning



 • Work with the sales team to build a long-term view of stock requirements

 • Ensure stock supports planned promotions, deal events and peak periods

 • Help prevent:

 • Overstock (cash tied up)

 • Stockouts during key selling periods

 • Late arrivals missing seasonal demand



Reporting & Insights



 • Provide clear weekly reports on:

 • Stock health

 • Forecast vs actual performance

 • UK vs EU stock allocation

 • Key risks and opportunities

 • Recommend actions to improve availability and efficiency





Requirements



 • Experience in inventory planning, merchandising or supply chain (ecommerce preferred)

 • Strong analytical skills (Excel / Google Sheets essential)

 • Experience working with sales forecasts and stock allocation across regions

 • Ability to interpret data and make commercial recommendations

 • High attention to detail and organisation







Highly Desirable



 • Experience with Amazon EU (UK + DE + EU5 markets)

 • Understanding of cross-border inventory and fulfilment (FBA / EFN / PAN-EU)

 • Experience with AI and tools like Linnworks or inventory systems

 • Background in consumer goods or fast-moving products





What Success Looks Like



 • Minimal stockouts across UK and EU markets

 • Efficient stock allocation between regions

 • Reduced overstock and excess inventory

 • Stock aligned with seasonality, demand and promotions

 • Clear visibility of risks before they happen

title: Amazon Germany Sales & Listing Optimiser - Top Level
description:
We are a fast-growing ecommerce business managing multiple brands across Amazon Europe. We are looking for an experienced Amazon Germany Account Analyst with a minimum of 5 years hands-on experience in the German Amazon marketplace.



This role is focused on daily performance analysis, keyword ranking, SEO optimisation and competitor tracking, with the goal of improving organic visibility and driving sales growth in Germany.





Key Responsibilities



Daily Sales & Performance Analysis

 • Monitor and analyse daily sales performance on Amazon Germany

 • Identify trends, issues and opportunities across key metrics

 • Report on sales, sessions, conversion rate and returns





Keyword Ranking & SEO Optimisation

 • Track keyword rankings using tools (e.g. Helium 10)

 • Identify opportunities to improve organic ranking and indexing

 • Optimise titles, bullet points and backend search terms for the German market

 • Ensure listings are fully optimised for German language and search behaviour





Listing & Conversion Optimisation

 • Review and improve product listings to increase conversion

 • Ensure images, A+ content and copy are aligned with German customer expectations

 • Suggest improvements based on performance data and customer feedback







Competitor & Market Analysis

 • Monitor key competitors within the German marketplace

 • Analyse pricing, keywords, reviews and positioning

title: Real Estate VA (ISA)
description:
***ATTENTION: READ THIS ENTIRE POST CAREFULLY***



How to Apply

•
: Send your application to

Who We Are

What’s In It For You?

title: Social Media Growth Strategist (Real Estate | Auckland-Focused | Remote)
description:
This is not a content role.

This is not a “post and hope” role.

This is a growth role.



We are Harcourts Hoverd & Co, a high-performance real estate business in Auckland, New Zealand, and we are looking for a proven Social Media Strategist who knows how to turn attention into opportunities, leads, and growth.



We operate across two core divisions:

• Residential Sales

• Property Management



Your job is to help us grow both aggressively and intelligently through social media.



-------------------------



The Opportunity



You will be responsible for building and executing a clear, strategic social media growth plan that drives:

• Appraisal bookings

• Property management enquiries

• Brand authority in our local market

• Recruitment of high-performing salespeople



You won’t be judged on how many posts you make.

You will be judged on results.



-------------------------



What We’re Looking For



We are NOT looking for a junior marketer or content scheduler.



We are looking for someone who:

• Thinks like a strategist first, executor second

• Understands how to build audience, trust, and conversion pipelines

• Knows how to turn content into real business outcomes

• Is data-driven, constantly testing, refining, and improving

• Has the confidence to bring ideas, direction, and leadership to the role



You should already know what good looks like and be able to take ownership from day one.



-------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities

• Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business growth targets



• Create and oversee content that builds authority, trust, and engagement across:

-

- Instagram

- LinkedIn

- TikTok



• Design campaigns that generate:

- Seller enquiries

- Landlord leads



- Recruitment conversations

• Manage and optimise paid campaigns for ROI and conversion

• Analyse performance and continuously refine strategy based on data

• Work alongside our internal team (design, sales, admin) to bring campaigns to life

• Identify opportunities to differentiate and dominate in the Auckland real estate space



-------------------------



What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

• Consistent growth in qualified enquiries (not just followers)

• Increased appraisal bookings and listing opportunities

• Growth in property management leads

• Strong engagement and local audience penetration

• Measurable contribution to agent recruitment

• Clear reporting and strategic insights



-------------------------



Your Background

• Proven experience as a Social Media Strategist (real estate preferred, but not essential if results are strong)

• Demonstrated success in driving growth, leads, or revenue through social media

• Deep understanding of:

o Meta 
/Instagram)

o LinkedIn

o TikTok

• Strong grasp of paid advertising and conversion strategy

• Excellent storytelling, positioning, and content direction skills



-------------------------



Why This Role is Different

• You will have real influence on business growth

• Your ideas will be implemented, not ignored

• You will work with a high-performance, results-driven team

• You will be measured on impact, not activity

• There is long-term opportunity for the right person



-------------------------



Role Details

• Full-time remote role

• NZ-aligned hours (9:30 AM – 6:00 PM NZT)

• Stable, established company with 25+ years in the market



-------------------------



How to Apply



Send us:

1. Your CV (with links to accounts you’ve managed)

2. Examples of campaigns or content that delivered real results

3. A short video explaining:

- How you approach social media strategy

- What results you’ve achieved

- Why you’re the right fit for this role



Please mention Harcourts Hoverd & Co in your video.

title: Happy Call Team(CS)
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

The Happy Call Team (CS) is responsible for ensuring customers have a positive experience with Haulla service by analyzing feedback, identifying improvements, and implementing effective solutions. Core responsibilities will include:



- Customer Satisfaction & Retention: Conduct proactive satisfaction checks ("Happy Calls") to verify customer satisfaction and identify potential friction points before they escalate into churn.

- AR & Collection Management: Proactively manage and collect outstanding AR (Accounts Receivable) to improve overall collection rates while minimizing customer attrition.

- Churn Mitigation & Recovery: Identify churn risks during the collection process and implement personalized recovery plans for long-term past-due accounts to encourage service re-entry and long-term loyalty.

- Billing Dispute Resolution: Serve as the primary point of contact for customer billing disputes and grievances, providing swift and effective resolutions that restore service confidence.

- Trust Rebuilding: Leverage positive collection experiences as an opportunity to rebuild trust and enhance the overall customer lifecycle value.



What We're Looking for

- This is a full-time remote position

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST), Monday to Friday.

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus





Good To Have

- Experience in Collection Agency(Over 3+ years)

- Experience in Call Center

- Language Skills: Proficiency in Spanish is not required but is considered a significant advantage.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements)

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Compensation



- Base salary plus performance-based bonuses

- Total earning potential: Php 60,000–130,000+/month

- Performance-based commission structure



Interested applicants may apply through the following Google form :

title: Cost Estimator (Construction/Demolition)
description:
Join Binners – a fast-growing construction services company in Toronto, Canada.



Binners provides demolition, bin rentals, waste removal, and construction support services across the Greater Toronto Area. Reliability is our brand, and strong estimating is critical to ensuring our projects are profitable, well-executed, and set up for success from day one.



If you’re analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in construction estimating, we want you on our team.



About the Role

As a Demolition Estimator, you will be responsible for reviewing project scopes, performing takeoffs, and building accurate, profitable estimates for demolition and related services.

You will work closely with sales and operations to ensure every job is priced correctly, clearly scoped, and aligned with execution in the field.

This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines, working Toronto business hours.



Responsibilities

-- Reviewing drawings, photos, and project details to understand full scope of work

-- Performing quantity takeoffs for demolition projects

-- Building detailed cost estimates including labour, equipment, disposal, and materials

-- Ensuring all estimates meet target margins and profitability goals

-- Identifying risks, missing scope, and potential cost issues before quoting

-- Clearly defining scope inclusions, exclusions, and assumptions

-- Coordinating with sales to finalize pricing and submit quotes

-- Supporting operations with clear job handoffs and documentation

-- Comparing estimated vs actual job performance to improve future accuracy

-- Continuously improving estimating templates, pricing models, and processes



Requirements

-- Experience in construction estimating (demolition experience strongly preferred)

-- Strong understanding of construction or demolition workflows

-- Ability to read drawings, plans, and project scopes

-- Strong analytical and numerical skills

-- Advanced proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

-- High attention to detail and accuracy

-- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-- Ability to work independently and make decisions

-- Organized and process-driven mindset

-- Stable internet connection, reliable computer, and quiet workspace

-- Willing to work Toronto timezone hours



Nice to Have

-- Experience estimating demolition, waste removal, or site services

-- Familiarity with construction drawings, blueprints, and takeoff tools

-- Familiarity with AutoCAD

-- Experience with estimating or project management software

-- Understanding of disposal costs, labour productivity, and job costing

title: Sales Representative
description:
About Us

Web Dynamics International is a fast-growing full-service digital marketing agency serving over 1,000 clients across four countries, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. We help small and medium-sized businesses build their online presence through social media management, paid advertising, and lead generation.

Founded in 2017, we started with door-to-door sales in Phoenix, Arizona and grew into an international agency with a team of 50+ employees. We are a company built on integrity, communication, and delivering a WOW customer experience to every client we work with.

We are expanding our sales team and are looking for driven, disciplined, and hungry sales representatives to join us full-time.



What You'll Be Doing

As a Sales Representative at Web Dynamics, you will be responsible for contacting inbound leads, running discovery calls, recommending the right package, closing deals, and managing your pipeline through our CRM system.

This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Leads are generated through our paid advertising campaigns, you are NOT cold calling strangers. You are calling people who have already expressed interest in our services.

Your daily responsibilities will include:



Contacting inbound leads through our dialer system

Running discovery to understand the prospect's business and needs

Recommending and presenting the right social media management package

Handling objections and closing deals on the call

Following up consistently with leads in your pipeline

Updating the CRM accurately after every call (notes, dispositions, opportunity value, tags)

Ensuring proper handoff to the onboarding team after every sale

Hitting a minimum of 300 calls per day

Working toward a goal of 50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue



What We're Looking For

We are not looking for order-takers. We are looking for closers  people who are hungry, disciplined, and don't take no for an answer easily.

You are a great fit if you:

Have a strong command of English (spoken and written)  this is non-negotiable as you will be speaking with US, Canadian, Australian, and UK business owners

Are comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls every day

Are coachable and willing to follow a proven sales process

Are self-motivated and don't need someone standing over your shoulder

Have a competitive mindset and are driven by results and commission

Can handle rejection without getting discouraged

Are organized and disciplined with CRM updates and follow-up

Have a quiet, professional workspace with a reliable internet connection

Have a working computer/laptop and headset



Preferred Experience & Skills

Previous sales experience (phone sales preferred)

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM is a big plus

Familiarity with 
 for team communication

Experience working with a US-based company or US clients

Digital marketing or social media knowledge is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Commission on every sale you close  the more you sell, the more you make

Full training provided through our comprehensive sales training portal

A structured, proven sales process with scripts and systems in place

A high-energy team environment with clear performance expectations

Room to grow within a fast-expanding international agency

Consistent leads  you will never have to prospect or cold call



Performance Expectations

We want to be upfront about what is expected here so there are no surprises:

Minimum 300 calls per day

Maximum 3-minute wrap time between calls

50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue is the baseline target

You are expected to be profitable within your first 30 days

Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly

CRM must be updated accurately after every single call

This is a performance-based role. If you show up, follow the process, and put in the work  you will make money. If you are looking for a relaxed job where you can coast, this is not the right fit.



Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (wired preferred)

Quiet, professional workspace with no background noise

Working computer/laptop

Quality headset for calls

Smartphone or ability to use 
 for team communication

Must be available Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Arizona Time (MST)  no exceptions

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced and results-driven Google Ads Specialist to manage and optimize our paid advertising campaigns. The ideal candidate knows how to get the most out of every dollar spent and can consistently deliver leads, traffic, and conversions through Google Ads.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Set up, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Shopping, YouTube, and Performance Max)

- Conduct thorough keyword research and build targeted ad groups

- Write compelling ad copy that drives clicks and conversions

- Set up and manage conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics

- Monitor campaign performance daily and make data-driven adjustments

- Manage budgets efficiently to maximize ROI and minimize wasted spend

- Run A/B tests on ads, landing pages, and bidding strategies

- Perform competitor analysis and identify new opportunities

- Provide clear weekly/monthly performance reports with insights and recommendations

- Set up and optimize remarketing campaigns to re-engage past visitors



REQUIREMENTS:

- Proven experience managing Google Ads campaigns (please share examples or results)

title: Lead Generation & Sales Closer (AI Solutions)
description:
Company: Simplify AI 



Position Type: Commission-Based Sales Role (Rapid Deployment)



Locations: United States, Singapore, Australia



About Us:



Simplify AI is revolutionizing healthcare delivery by providing AI-powered solutions designed specifically for clinics. Our platform streamlines operations, enhances patient care, and reduces administrative burden—solving real pain points that clinic owners face daily.



The Opportunity:



We're in hyper-growth mode and building an elite sales force to establish our presence across three key markets. This is a high-impact, high-reward role for driven individuals who thrive in fast-paced, commission-based environments. You'll be part of a founding sales team that's shaping the future of healthcare AI.



What You'll Do:



Identify and qualify clinic prospects across your assigned market through research, networking, and direct outreach

Share our professionally produced 5-10 minute Loom video pitch (we provide this) that explains our solution and pricing

Collect payment from interested clinics

collect screenshot of invoice for processed payments

Maintain accurate records and reporting on all leads and closures

Provide feedback on market conditions and prospect interest levels

That's it. Simple, repeatable, scalable.



Compensation Structure:



Per Closed Deal: 20% commission on the $3,000 SGD clinic onboarding fee

Calculation: Close a clinic ? Earn $600 SGD (~$450 USD) per signed deal

High-Volume Opportunity: Top performers closing 10-15 clinics per month can earn $6,000-$9,000 SGD monthly

Payment processed monthly for verified closures



What We're Looking For:



Essential Qualities:



Relentless Drive: You're motivated by results and commission. Pure hunters only.

Prospecting Excellence: You know how to find clinic owners, get contact info, and get meetings without hand-holding.

Persistence: You can handle rejection. You don't take "no" personally.

Basic Communication: You can introduce yourself professionally, share a link, and follow up. No complex sales skills needed—the video does the selling.

Reliability: You track your own pipeline and deliver accurate reporting.



Preferred Experience:



1+ years of sales, business development, or lead generation experience

Experience prospecting B2B or healthcare contacts

Comfort with independent, commission-based work

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Why Join Now:



Pure upside: No salary, no overhead—you only earn when you close

Simple process: Find prospect ? Send video ? Collect payment ? Get paid

Work entirely independently across a massive market

Low friction, high reward model

Be part of a mission improving healthcare delivery globally

Application & Group Interview Process:



We're running a competitive selection process designed to identify the top 10-20 candidates:



Submit: Tell us why you're the right fit (brief video or written response)

Group Interview Round: Participate in a 45 mins - 1 hour intensive session with
candidates where we evaluate prospecting skills, resilience, and drive

Real-World Challenge: You'll be given 10 clinic names and need to get as many responses/interest as possible—we evaluate your prospecting ability live

Final Selection: Top performers move directly to deployment with live onboarding



How to Apply:

Send an
 to
