title: Marketing & Operations Executive Assistant
description:
THE ROLE:

We are a Singapore-based consultancy launching a book and building a lead generation engine for our B2B sales training and consulting business. I need a sharp, organised Executive Assistant to run the operational side of our marketing so I can focus on content, clients, and relationships. This is not a content writing role. I write all content. Your job is to make sure it gets out on time, gets tracked, and follows up properly.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN:



Scheduling and publishing LinkedIn posts from approved drafts

Monitoring LinkedIn comments and DMs — flagging anything that needs my personal response

Managing contacts in HubSpot CRM — logging new leads, updating contact statuses, tracking outreach progress, and escalating warm replies to me within 24 hours

Monitoring HubSpot
 sequences — tracking open rates, click rates, and flagging contacts who engage so I can follow up personally

Monitoring Dripify LinkedIn automation sequences — checking responses weekly, flagging warm replies for my personal follow-up, and ensuring no sequence runs beyond its set parameters

Coordinating podcast outreach — researching shows, sending pitches from approved templates, scheduling appearances

Managing the warm outreach tracker — recording who has been contacted, responses received, and next actions

Light Squarespace website updates — content updates only, not design

General scheduling and calendar coordination



TOOLS YOU SHOULD KNOW

HubSpot CRM and
 sequences

Dripify (LinkedIn automation)

LinkedIn (Business pages and personal profile management)

Squarespace

Calendly

ScoreApp



WHO YOU ARE:



Excellent written English — your
s and messages represent me

Highly organised — you track everything and nothing falls through the cracks

Proactive — you flag problems before they become problems, not after

Available during Singapore business hours (some flexibility on start/end time)

Minimum 3 years experience supporting a business owner, founder, or marketing function

Experience in a B2B business environment is a strong advantage

Comfortable working independently without daily supervision

title: Creator Outreach & Partnerships (TikTok + Instagram)
description:
About BODDI

- BODDI is a small, growing brand launched just over a year ago focused on waterless hygiene — creating no-rinse solutions to help people stay clean anywhere, anytime. Think shower in a bottle for van lifers, festival campers, hikers, athletes, and busy people on the move.We are looking for someone to partner closely with on creator sourcing and outreach as we continue to grow.



Website: 



Role Overview

- Part time, 2–3 hours per day, Monday through Friday. Approximately 10 hours per week. $8/hour paid weekly.

The goal: find the right creators and start real conversations that lead to genuine engagement. This is not mass outreach. Every DM should feel like it came from a human who actually watched their content,



What You Will Do

- Source a weekly list of creators on TikTok and Instagram based on defined criteria including niche alignment, follower count (5K–25K sweet spot), engagement rate, and posting consistency

- Compile creator details into a shared spreadsheet including name, handles,
 if available, follower count, and average video views

- Write 1–2 personalized lines per creator before outreach — referencing something specific from their content

- Send outreach via DM or
 using approved scripts, managing the conversation naturally until they respond

- Coordinate gifting — communicate what they will receive and collect shipping addresses

- Mark creators as ready to ship once confirmed — BODDI team handles all fulfillment from there

- Manage follow-up sequence on all outreach and shipped packages

- Send a weekly report every Friday: DMs sent, replies received, addresses collected, packages sent, posts received





Who This Is For

- Strong understanding of TikTok and Instagram — you know how to find real creators, not just big accounts

- You write like a human, not a brand — natural, warm, and specific

- Comfortable managing ongoing DM and
 conversations

- Detail-oriented and organized — spreadsheets do not scare you

- Good judgment — you can tell the difference between someone who actually lives the lifestyle and someone who just posts 

- Consistent - following up and engaging daily 



Nice to Have

- Experience with influencer outreach, UGC, or creator partnerships

- Experience working with consumer brands or DTC brands



To Apply

Please include the word CLEAN somewhere in your application and tell us in 2–3 sentences why you would be a good fit for BODDI. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Legal Assistant / Intake & Case Manager
description:
About Us



We are a U.S.- based law firm handling Personal Injury and Business/Transactional matters.



Our firm operates on structured systems and workflows using:

• MyCase (case management)

• Google Workspace (Drive, Gmail, Chat)

• Zoom and phone systems



We are hiring a high-level Virtual Legal Assistant who can immediately step in and execute within our systems.



IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING

You will NOT be considered if you do not meet ALL of the following:

• You have prior law firm experience

• You have direct experience using MyCase

• You submit a voice recording (1–2 minutes)



Applications missing any of the above will be automatically rejected.



Role Overview

This role focuses on:

• lead intake and conversion

• sending engagement agreements

• client onboarding

• case setup and organization

• document and task management



Responsibilities

Lead Intake & Conversion

• Review and approve leads in MyCase

• Schedule consultations (Zoom/phone)

• Follow up with potential clients



Engagement & Onboarding

• Send engagement agreements via e-signature

• Track signed agreements

• Convert leads into active cases



Case Setup & Organization

• Open and structure matters in MyCase

• Apply correct folder templates 

• Upload onboarding documents



Document &
 Management

• Upload documents and
s into MyCase

• Follow strict naming conventions

• Add notes and status updates



Task & Follow-Up Management

• Track outstanding items

• Create and manage follow-up tasks

• Ensure nothing is missed





Case Types

Personal Injury

• Intake ? Retainer ? Case setup

• Medical records and treatment tracking



Business / Transactional

• Engagement quotes and retainers

• Contract and document workflow support



Required Skills

• Proven experience working in a law firm

• Hands-on experience using MyCase

• Strong organizational skills

• Excellent written English

• Ability to follow detailed SOPs 



This Role Is NOT For You If:

• You do not have law firm experience

• You have not used MyCase before

• You do not follow instructions carefully

• You require constant supervision



Compensation

• Competitive (based on experience)

• Opportunity for long-term growth



How to Apply

Submit the following:

1. A short introduction

2. Your law firm experience (be specific)

3. Your experience using MyCase

4. A voice recording (1–2 minutes) explaining your experience



Applications missing any requirement will not be reviewed.



Final Note

We are building a high-performance, systems-driven law firm.

If you are organized, detail-oriented, and experienced with MyCase, we want to hear from you.

title: Full-Time Property Management Virtual Assistant
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Property Management Virtual Assistant to support a growing real estate business with administrative and operational tasks across a dynamic property portfolio. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, process-driven, and capable of working in an ad hoc environment where priorities may shift depending on workload. The VA will assist with CMA preparation, application processing, document preparation, and maintenance coordination using tools such as PropertyMe, Snug, Inspection Express, Pricefinder, and Google Workspace. The ideal candidate thrives on accuracy, follows instructions meticulously, and can independently manage tasks while maintaining consistency and compliance. This position plays a key role in freeing up the business owner’s time to focus on growth and client-facing activities.



Key Responsibilities:



Property Management Administration



· Manage and update property data in PropertyMe, ensuring accuracy and completeness of records



· Process tenancy applications using Snug, including reviewing documents and tracking applicant progress



· Prepare and send notices (e.g., breach notices, lease renewals) through PropertyMe and DocuSign



· Assist with lease documentation, including Form 5, Form 6, and other RTA-related forms using Google Docs



CMA & Reporting Support



· Prepare Comparative Market Analyses (CMAs) using Pricefinder and maintain tracking via Excel spreadsheets



· Compile CMA data into clear, one-page rental appraisal documents for internal stakeholders



· Update and manage CMA tracking spreadsheets in Excel and Google Sheets



Maintenance & Operations Coordination



· Coordinate maintenance requests through PropertyMe and follow up with contractors for completion updates



· Track inspection schedules and outcomes using Inspection Express



· Ensure all maintenance records and communications are logged accurately in relevant systems



Calendar & Task Management



· Manage calendars, task lists, and workflow tracking using Google Workspace tools



· Prioritize urgent tasks and ensure deadlines are met across multiple systems and workflows



· Communicate updates and task progress via
 and WhatsApp



Required Skills & Experience



· 2+ years of experience in property management administration or virtual assistant support



· Strong attention to detail with the ability to follow processes and checklists accurately



· Experience with property management software such as PropertyMe (or similar platforms)



· Proven ability to manage data entry, document preparation, and system updates with high accuracy



· Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to prioritize shifting tasks



· Strong written communication skills for handling
s, notices, and documentation



Preferred Skills



· Experience preparing CMAs and rental appraisals using tools like Pricefinder



· Familiarity with Australian property management processes and documentation (e.g., RTA forms)



· Experience supporting fast-growing or startup-style property portfolios



Tools & Software Proficiency



· Property Management Systems: PropertyMe, Snug, Inspection Express



· Data & Reporting: Pricefinder, Excel Spreadsheets, Google Sheets



· Communication & Collaboration: Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Docs), WhatsApp



· Document Signing & Forms: DocuSign

title: Golang Developer (Hybrid)
description:
Key Responsibilities • Design, develop, and maintain high performance, scalable, and secure backend services using Golang. • Architect, implement, and optimize microservices-based applications. • Build RESTful APIs, gRPC services, and integrations with internal/external systems. • Work with cloud platforms (AWS / GCP / Azure) to deploy and manage applications. • Develop solutions using concurrency patterns, Go routines, and channels. • Implement CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks. • Participate in code reviews, ensure high coding standards, and drive best practices. • Troubleshoot production issues, optimize performance, and improve system reliability. • Collaborate with cross functional teams (DevOps, QA, Product). • Mentor junior/mid-level engineers and contribute to architectural decisions. 



Required Skills & Qualifications • 7+ years of professional software development experience. • 3–5+ years hands on experience with Golang in production environments. • Strong understanding of: o Distributed systems o Concurrency and multithreading patterns in Go o Microservices architecture o REST/gRPC APIs • Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and container orchestration. • Proficiency with relational and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis). • Knowledge of cloud services (AWS/GCP/Azure) and serverless ecosystems. • Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.). • Familiarity with monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, OpenTelemetry). • Strong problem solving skills, system design knowledge, and debugging capabilities. • Excellent communication and ability to work in an agile environment.
